  "newString": "            elif self.quant_config.layer_quant_mode.has_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8():\n                return W4A8MXFP4FP8CutlassFusedMoEMethod()\n            elif self.quant_config.layer_quant_mode.has_w4a8_mxfp4_int8():\n                return W4A8MXFP4INT8CutlassFusedMoEMethod()\n            elif self.quant_config.layer_quant_mode.has_w4a16_mxfp4():\n                return WFP4A16FusedMoEMethod()\n            elif self.quant_config.layer_quant_mode.has_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8():\n                return W4A8MXFP4MXFP8CutlassFusedMoEMethod()",
  "oldString": "            elif self.quant_config.layer_quant_mode.has_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8():\n                return W4A8MXFP4FP8CutlassFusedMoEMethod()\n            elif self.quant_config.layer_quant_mode.has_w4a16_mxfp4():\n                return WFP4A16FusedMoEMethod()\n            elif self.quant_config.layer_quant_mode.has_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8():\n                return W4A8MXFP4MXFP8CutlassFusedMoEMethod()",
  "originalFile": "import inspect\nimport os\nfrom functools import cached_property\nfrom typing import Dict, List, Optional, Tuple, Union\n\nimport torch\n\nfrom tensorrt_llm._mnnvl_utils import MnnvlMemory, MnnvlMoe\nfrom tensorrt_llm._torch.distributed.moe_alltoall import MoeAlltoAll\nfrom tensorrt_llm._utils import get_sm_version\nfrom tensorrt_llm.logger import logger\nfrom tensorrt_llm.models.modeling_utils import QuantAlgo\nfrom tensorrt_llm.tools.layer_wise_benchmarks import get_calibrator\n\nfrom ...distributed import allgather\nfrom ...expert_statistic import ExpertStatistic\nfrom ...model_config import ModelConfig\nfrom ...utils import (ActivationType, AuxStreamType, EventType,\n                      Fp4QuantizedTensor)\nfrom .interface import AlltoallMethodType, MoE\nfrom .quantization import UnquantizedFusedMoEMethod\n\n# isort: off\nfrom .quantization import (\n    DeepSeekFP8BlockScalesFusedMoEMethod, FP8QDQFusedMoEMethod,\n    MoEWeightLoadingMode, NVFP4CutlassFusedMoEMethod, UnquantizedFusedMoEMethod,\n    INT8WoqPerChannelFusedMoEMethod, W4A8MXFP4FP8CutlassFusedMoEMethod,\n    W4A8MXFP4INT8CutlassFusedMoEMethod, W4A8MXFP4MXFP8CutlassFusedMoEMethod,\n    WFP4A16FusedMoEMethod, WInt4AFP8FusedMoEMethod)\n# isort: on\nfrom .routing import BaseMoeRoutingMethod\n\n\nclass CutlassFusedMoE(MoE):\n    \"\"\"\n    Fused Mixture of Experts (MoE) Layer with performance tuning.\n\n    Args:\n        num_experts (int): Number of experts in the MoE layer.\n        top_k (int): Number of top experts to select for each input token.\n        hidden_size (int): Size of the hidden state.\n        intermediate_size (int): Size of the intermediate state.\n        aux_stream_dict (Optional[Dict[AuxStreamType, torch.cuda.Stream]]): Auxiliary CUDA streams for overlapping.\n        dtype (Optional[torch.dtype]): Data type for the weights.\n        reduce_results (bool): Whether to reduce the results across devices.\n        model_config (ModelConfig): Configuration object for the model.\n\n    MoE torch custom op:\n        In max-throughput mode:\n        Quant:\n            fp8 block scales (SM90 Hopper only):\n                FusedMoE Op: dynamic quant + scatter + gemm1 + swiglu + gemm2 + finalizeMoeRoute (return one tensor)\n            p8 qdq, nvfp4:\n                FusedMoE Op: scatter + gemm1 + swiglu + gemm2 + finalizeMoeRoute (return one tensor)\n\n    FusedMoE module:\n        max-throughput mode:\n            routing(topK, etc.) [+ dynamic quant for fp8 qdq and nvfp4 ] [+ fp4_allgather] + FusedMoe Op[no allreduce] + reducescatter, with AttentionDP on\n            equals to: dynamic quant + routing(topK, etc.) [+ fp4_allgather] + scatter + gemm1 + swiglu + gemm2 + finalizeMoeRoute [no allreduce] + reducescatter\n    \"\"\"\n\n    # Quantization algorithm support table for can_implement()\n    # Format: quant_algo -> {sm_constraint, dtypes}\n    # sm_constraint types:\n    #   - (\"min\", N): SM >= N\n    #   - (\"exact\", N): SM == N\n    #   - (\"in\", {N1, N2, ...}): SM in set\n    _QUANT_SUPPORT_TABLE = {\n        # Unquantized (FP16/BF16): SM >= 80\n        None: {\n            \"sm_constraint\": (\"min\", 80),\n            \"dtypes\": {torch.float16, torch.bfloat16},\n        },\n        # FP8 per-tensor (QDQ): SM >= 89\n        QuantAlgo.FP8: {\n            \"sm_constraint\": (\"min\", 89),\n            \"dtypes\": {torch.float16, torch.bfloat16, torch.float32},\n        },\n        # FP8_BLOCK_SCALES: SM == 90 only\n        QuantAlgo.FP8_BLOCK_SCALES: {\n            \"sm_constraint\": (\"exact\", 90),\n            \"dtypes\": {torch.float16, torch.bfloat16, torch.float32},\n        },\n        # NVFP4: SM in {100, 103}\n        QuantAlgo.NVFP4: {\n            \"sm_constraint\": (\"in\", {100, 103}),\n            \"dtypes\": {torch.float16, torch.bfloat16, torch.float8_e4m3fn},\n        },\n        # W4A8_AWQ: SM in {89, 90} only\n        QuantAlgo.W4A8_AWQ: {\n            \"sm_constraint\": (\"in\", {89, 90}),\n            \"dtypes\": {torch.float16, torch.bfloat16},\n        },\n        # W8A16: SM >= 80\n        QuantAlgo.W8A16: {\n            \"sm_constraint\": (\"min\", 80),\n            \"dtypes\": {torch.float16, torch.bfloat16},\n        },\n        # W4A16_MXFP4: SM == 90 only\n        QuantAlgo.W4A16_MXFP4: {\n            \"sm_constraint\": (\"exact\", 90),\n            \"dtypes\": {torch.float16, torch.bfloat16},\n        },\n        # W4A8_MXFP4_FP8: SM in {100, 103}\n        QuantAlgo.W4A8_MXFP4_FP8: {\n            \"sm_constraint\": (\"in\", {100, 103}),\n            \"dtypes\": {torch.float16, torch.bfloat16, torch.float32},\n        },\n        # W4A8_MXFP4_INT8: SM in {100, 103}\n        QuantAlgo.W4A8_MXFP4_INT8: {\n            \"sm_constraint\": (\"in\", {100, 103}),\n            \"dtypes\": {torch.float16, torch.bfloat16, torch.float32},\n        },\n        # W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8: SM in {100, 103}\n        QuantAlgo.W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8: {\n            \"sm_constraint\": (\"in\", {100, 103}),\n            \"dtypes\": {torch.float16, torch.bfloat16},\n        },\n    }\n\n    # Quantization algorithms that support gptoss_style\n    _GPTOSS_SUPPORTED_ALGOS = {QuantAlgo.W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8}\n\n    @classmethod\n    def can_implement(\n        cls,\n        quant_algo: Optional[QuantAlgo],\n        dtype_activation: torch.dtype = torch.bfloat16,\n        gptoss_style: bool = False,\n    ) -> Tuple[bool, Optional[str]]:\n        \"\"\"\n        Check if CutlassFusedMoE can implement the given quantization algorithm.\n\n        CutlassFusedMoE supports:\n        - Unquantized (FP16/BF16): SM >= 80\n        - FP8 per-tensor (QDQ): SM >= 89\n        - FP8_BLOCK_SCALES: SM == 90 only\n        - NVFP4: SM in {100, 103}\n        - W4A8_AWQ: SM in {89, 90} only\n        - W8A16: SM >= 80\n        - W4A16_MXFP4: SM == 90 only\n        - W4A8_MXFP4_FP8: SM in {100, 103}\n        - W4A8_MXFP4_INT8: SM in {100, 103}\n        - W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8: SM in {100, 103}\n\n        Args:\n            quant_algo: The quantization algorithm to check (None for unquantized)\n            dtype_activation: The activation input data type (before quantization).\n                Supported dtypes vary by quantization mode:\n                - Unquantized: float16, bfloat16\n                - FP8/FP8_BLOCK_SCALES/W4A8_MXFP4_FP8/W4A8_MXFP4_INT8: float16, bfloat16, float32\n                - NVFP4: float16, bfloat16, float8_e4m3fn\n                - W4A16_MXFP4/W4A8_AWQ/W8A16/W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8: float16, bfloat16\n            gptoss_style: Whether gptoss_style (bias/swiglu with custom alpha/beta/limit) is enabled.\n                CutlassFusedMoE only supports gptoss_style for W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8 quantization.\n\n        Returns:\n            Tuple[bool, Optional[str]]: (can_implement, skip_reason)\n        \"\"\"\n        from .interface import _warn_and_return\n\n        sm_version = get_sm_version()\n\n        # Check minimum SM version for Cutlass backend\n        if sm_version < 80:\n            return _warn_and_return(\n                f\"CutlassFusedMoE requires SM >= 80, got SM{sm_version}\")\n\n        # Check gptoss_style support\n        if gptoss_style and quant_algo not in cls._GPTOSS_SUPPORTED_ALGOS:\n            return _warn_and_return(\n                f\"CutlassFusedMoE gptoss_style only supports W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8 \"\n                f\"(got quant_algo={quant_algo})\")\n\n        # Check if quant_algo is supported\n        if quant_algo not in cls._QUANT_SUPPORT_TABLE:\n            return _warn_and_return(\n                f\"CutlassFusedMoE does not support quant_algo={quant_algo}\")\n\n        support_info = cls._QUANT_SUPPORT_TABLE[quant_algo]\n\n        # Check SM version constraint\n        constraint_type, constraint_value = support_info[\"sm_constraint\"]\n        algo_name = \"unquantized\" if quant_algo is None else quant_algo.name\n\n        if constraint_type == \"min\":\n            if sm_version < constraint_value:\n                return _warn_and_return(\n                    f\"CutlassFusedMoE {algo_name} requires SM >= {constraint_value}, \"\n                    f\"got SM{sm_version}\")\n        elif constraint_type == \"exact\":\n            if sm_version != constraint_value:\n                return _warn_and_return(\n                    f\"CutlassFusedMoE {algo_name} only supports SM{constraint_value}, \"\n                    f\"got SM{sm_version}\")\n        elif constraint_type == \"in\":\n            if sm_version not in constraint_value:\n                sm_list = \"/\".join(f\"SM{v}\" for v in sorted(constraint_value))\n                return _warn_and_return(\n                    f\"CutlassFusedMoE {algo_name} only supports {sm_list}, \"\n                    f\"got SM{sm_version}\")\n\n        # Check dtype_activation\n        supported_dtypes = support_info[\"dtypes\"]\n        if dtype_activation not in supported_dtypes:\n            dtype_list = \", \".join(str(d) for d in supported_dtypes)\n            return _warn_and_return(\n                f\"CutlassFusedMoE {algo_name} requires {dtype_list}, \"\n                f\"got {dtype_activation}\")\n\n        return True, None\n\n    def __init__(\n        self,\n        *,\n        routing_method: BaseMoeRoutingMethod,\n        num_experts: int,\n        hidden_size: int,\n        intermediate_size: int,\n        dtype: Optional[torch.dtype] = None,\n        reduce_results: bool = False,\n        model_config: ModelConfig = ModelConfig(),\n        aux_stream_dict: Optional[Dict[AuxStreamType,\n                                       torch.cuda.Stream]] = None,\n        weight_loading_mode: MoEWeightLoadingMode = MoEWeightLoadingMode.\n        VANILLA,\n        bias: bool = False,\n        apply_router_weight_on_input: bool = False,\n        layer_idx: Optional[int] = None,\n        swiglu_alpha: Optional[torch.Tensor] = None,\n        swiglu_beta: Optional[torch.Tensor] = None,\n        swiglu_limit: Optional[torch.Tensor] = None,\n        init_load_balancer: bool = True,\n        without_comm: bool = False,\n        activation_type: ActivationType = ActivationType.Swiglu,\n    ):\n\n        super().__init__(\n            routing_method=routing_method,\n            num_experts=num_experts,\n            hidden_size=hidden_size,\n            intermediate_size=intermediate_size,\n            dtype=dtype,\n            reduce_results=reduce_results,\n            model_config=model_config,\n            weight_loading_mode=weight_loading_mode,\n            bias=bias,\n            swiglu_alpha=swiglu_alpha,\n            swiglu_beta=swiglu_beta,\n            swiglu_limit=swiglu_limit,\n            layer_idx=layer_idx,\n            init_load_balancer=init_load_balancer,\n            activation_type=activation_type,\n        )\n\n        # Store original hidden size before any potential padding\n        self.unpadded_hidden_size = self.hidden_size\n\n        if model_config.quant_config and model_config.quant_config.layer_quant_mode.has_w4a16_mxfp4(\n        ):\n            self.hidden_size = ((self.hidden_size + 127) // 128) * 128\n            self.intermediate_size_per_partition = (\n                (self.intermediate_size_per_partition + 127) // 128) * 128\n\n        # Note: num_slots, expert_size_per_partition, initial_global_assignments,\n        # slot_start, slot_end, initial_local_expert_ids are all initialized by\n        # base class's _init_load_balancer() method\n\n        # moe_max_num_tokens is set in ModelConfig.__post_init__ if not specified\n        # The default value is max_num_tokens * dp_size\n        self.moe_max_num_tokens = model_config.moe_max_num_tokens\n        # The auxiliary CUDA stream and CUDA events are only used when MoE chunking is applied\n        default_moe_max_num_tokens = model_config.max_num_tokens * model_config.mapping.dp_size\n        if self.moe_max_num_tokens < default_moe_max_num_tokens:\n            self.aux_stream = aux_stream_dict[\n                AuxStreamType.\n                MoeChunkingOverlap] if aux_stream_dict is not None else torch.cuda.Stream(\n                )\n            self.event_dict = {\n                key: torch.cuda.Event()\n                for key in [EventType.Main, EventType.MoeChunkingOverlap]\n            }\n        else:\n            self.aux_stream = None\n            self.event_dict = None\n\n        # The profiler converges on the same best tactic when the number of tokens is large enough.\n        # To avoid long profiling time, the max number of tokens used in the profiling is capped to\n        # around 16k tokens per expert, which is well into the compute bound domain.\n        self.tune_max_num_tokens = min(\n            self.moe_max_num_tokens,\n            16384 * self.num_slots // routing_method.get_experts_per_token(),\n        )\n        self.has_been_profiled = False\n        self.has_been_profiled_min_latency = False\n\n        # When without_comm=True, skip communication initialization (ConfigurableMoE will handle it)\n        if not without_comm:\n            self.alltoall_method_type = self.select_alltoall_method_type()\n            logger.info_once(\n                f\"{self.__class__.__name__} selects alltoall_method_type {self.alltoall_method_type!r}\",\n                key=\"alltoall_method_type\")\n            self.alltoall_workspace = None\n            self.alltoall_prepare_workspace = None\n            self.use_low_precision_combine = False\n            if self.enable_alltoall:\n                self.use_low_precision_combine = model_config.use_low_precision_moe_combine\n\n                if self.alltoall_method_type == AlltoallMethodType.NVLinkTwoSided:\n                    MnnvlMemory.initialize()\n                    self.alltoall_workspace = MnnvlMoe.get_moe_workspaces(\n                        model_config.mapping)\n                    self.alltoall_prepare_workspace = MnnvlMoe.get_moe_prepare_workspace(\n                        model_config.mapping)\n                elif self.alltoall_method_type == AlltoallMethodType.NVLinkOneSided:\n                    # Calculate required workspace size\n                    ep_size = self.mapping.moe_ep_size\n                    max_num_tokens = model_config.max_num_tokens\n                    hidden_size = self.hidden_size\n                    dtype = self.dtype or torch.float16\n\n                    workspace_size = MoeAlltoAll.calculate_required_workspace_size(\n                        ep_size,\n                        self.routing_method.experts_per_token,\n                        max_num_tokens,\n                        hidden_size,\n                        dtype,\n                        self.num_experts if self.layer_load_balancer else None,\n                    )\n\n                    self.moe_a2a = MoeAlltoAll(\n                        mapping=self.mapping,\n                        max_num_tokens=model_config.max_num_tokens,\n                        top_k=self.routing_method.experts_per_token,\n                        num_slots=self.num_slots,\n                        workspace_size_per_rank=workspace_size,\n                        num_experts=self.num_experts\n                        if self.layer_load_balancer else None,\n                    )\n                elif self.alltoall_method_type == AlltoallMethodType.DeepEP or self.alltoall_method_type == AlltoallMethodType.DeepEPLowLatency:\n                    raise NotImplementedError(\n                        \"DeepEP and DeepEPLowLatency are not supported for CutlassFusedMoE yet\"\n                    )\n                else:\n                    raise NotImplementedError(\n                        f\"Unsupported alltoall method type: {self.alltoall_method_type!r}\"\n                    )\n        else:\n            # When without_comm=True, set minimal attributes\n            # Communication will be handled by parent wrapper (e.g., ConfigurableMoE)\n            self.alltoall_method_type = AlltoallMethodType.NotEnabled\n            self.alltoall_workspace = None\n            self.alltoall_prepare_workspace = None\n            self.use_low_precision_combine = False\n            self.moe_a2a = None\n\n        # If True, the router weight will be multiplied on the input rather than at the end of FC2\n        self.apply_router_weight_on_input = apply_router_weight_on_input\n\n        # Finalize fusion should be disabled if Lora is used.\n        self.use_fused_finalize = not model_config.moe_disable_finalize_fusion and model_config.lora_config is None\n\n        self._weights_created = False\n        if not model_config.skip_create_weights_in_init:\n            self.create_weights()\n\n    def _check_configs(self):\n        assert self._weights_created\n\n        if self.apply_router_weight_on_input:\n            assert self.routing_method.top_k == 1, \"Current walkaround only supports top-1 routing\"\n\n        if self.quant_config and self.quant_config.quant_mode.has_any_quant(\n                exclude_kv_cache=True):\n            if not (self.quant_config.quant_mode.has_nvfp4()\n                    | self.quant_config.quant_mode.has_fp8_block_scales()\n                    | self.quant_config.quant_mode.has_fp8_qdq()\n                    | self.quant_config.quant_mode.is_weight_only()\n                    | self.quant_config.quant_mode.has_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8()\n                    | self.quant_config.quant_mode.has_w4a16_mxfp4()\n                    | self.quant_config.quant_mode.has_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8()):\n                raise ValueError(\n                    f\"unsupported quantization mode: {self.quant_config.quant_mode}\"\n                )\n\n    @property\n    def has_w4afp8(self):\n        assert self._weights_created\n        return self.quant_config and self.quant_config.quant_mode.is_int4_weight_only_per_group(\n        )\n\n    @property\n    def has_int8_woq_per_channel(self):\n        return self.quant_config and self.quant_config.layer_quant_mode.is_int8_weight_only(\n        ) and not self.quant_config.layer_quant_mode.has_per_group_scaling()\n\n    def select_alltoall_method_type(self) -> AlltoallMethodType:\n        # If no attention DP, no need to use AlltoAll.\n        if self.mapping.dp_size == 1:\n            return AlltoallMethodType.NotEnabled\n\n        # AlltoAll cannot support MoE TP.\n        if self.mapping.moe_tp_size != 1:\n            return AlltoallMethodType.NotEnabled\n\n        if not MnnvlMemory.supports_mnnvl():\n            return AlltoallMethodType.NotEnabled\n\n        all2all_method_type = os.environ.get(\"TRTLLM_FORCE_ALLTOALL_METHOD\")\n        if all2all_method_type is not None:\n            if AlltoallMethodType[all2all_method_type] in [\n                    AlltoallMethodType.DeepEP,\n                    AlltoallMethodType.DeepEPLowLatency\n            ]:\n                raise NotImplementedError(\n                    \"DeepEP and DeepEPLowLatency are not supported for CutlassFusedMoE yet\"\n                )\n            return AlltoallMethodType[all2all_method_type]\n\n        # TODO: We found that NVLinkOneSided performs better than NCCL AllGather/ReduceScatter,\n        # regardless of the relationship between EP size and topK. We favor NVLinkOneSided for now.\n        # if not self.mapping.moe_ep_size > self.routing_method.experts_per_token:\n        #     return AlltoallMethodType.NotEnabled\n        return AlltoallMethodType.NVLinkOneSided\n\n    @cached_property\n    def enable_alltoall(self):\n        \"\"\" enable_alltoall (bool): whether to enable alltoall instead of allgather/reducescatter\n        \"\"\"\n        return self.alltoall_method_type != AlltoallMethodType.NotEnabled\n\n    def quantize_input(\n        self,\n        x: Union[torch.Tensor, Fp4QuantizedTensor],\n        post_quant_comm: bool = True,\n        **kwargs,\n    ) -> Tuple[torch.Tensor, Optional[torch.Tensor]]:\n        \"\"\"\n        Quantize input tensor - CutlassFusedMoE implementation\n\n        Handles all quantization cases for Cutlass backend.\n\n        Args:\n            x: Input tensor to quantize\n            post_quant_comm: Whether this is for post-quantization communication\n                           (allgather or alltoall). If True, x_sf will be reshaped to 2D.\n\n        Returns:\n            Tuple of (quantized_x, x_sf)\n        \"\"\"\n        x_sf = None\n        if self.has_any_quant:\n            if self.has_fp8_qdq or self.has_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8:\n                x, _ = torch.ops.tensorrt_llm.static_quantize_e4m3_per_tensor(\n                    x, self.fc31_input_dequant)\n            elif self.has_deepseek_fp8_block_scales:\n                # No quantization needed here, handled in kernel\n                pass\n            elif self.has_w4afp8:\n                # No quantization needed here, handled in kernel\n                pass\n            elif self.has_w4a16_mxfp4:\n                pad_size = self.hidden_size - x.shape[1]\n                x = torch.nn.functional.pad(x, (0, pad_size))\n            elif self.has_int8_woq_per_channel:\n                # No quantization needed here, handled in kernel\n                pass\n            elif self.has_nvfp4:\n                if hasattr(\n                        self,\n                        'fc31_act_scale') and self.fc31_act_scale is not None:\n                    assert not isinstance(\n                        x, Fp4QuantizedTensor\n                    ), \"Fp4QuantizedTensor is not expected for AWQ quantization.\"\n                    x = x * self.fc31_act_scale\n                # Quantize based on communication scenario\n                if post_quant_comm:\n                    if isinstance(x, Fp4QuantizedTensor):\n                        assert not x.is_sf_swizzled, \"Fp4QuantizedTensor should not be swizzled before communication\"\n                        x, x_sf = x.fp4_tensor, x.scaling_factor\n                        x_row = x.shape[0]\n                    else:\n                        x_row = x.shape[0]\n                        x, x_sf = torch.ops.trtllm.fp4_quantize(\n                            x, self.fc31_input_scale, self.scaling_vector_size,\n                            False, False)\n                    # Reshape x_sf to 2D for post-quant communication\n                    if x_sf is not None:\n                        x_sf = x_sf.view((x_row, -1))\n                else:\n                    if not isinstance(x, Fp4QuantizedTensor):\n                        x, x_sf = torch.ops.trtllm.fp4_quantize(\n                            x, self.fc31_input_scale, self.scaling_vector_size,\n                            False, True)\n            elif self.has_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8:\n                if post_quant_comm:\n                    x, x_sf = torch.ops.trtllm.mxfp8_quantize(\n                        x, False, alignment=self.quant_method.weight_alignment)\n                    # Reshape x_sf to 2D for post-quant communication\n                    # x.shape[0] is padded\n                    if x_sf is not None:\n                        x_sf = x_sf.view((x.shape[0], -1))\n                else:\n                    x, x_sf = torch.ops.trtllm.mxfp8_quantize(\n                        x, True, alignment=self.quant_method.weight_alignment)\n            else:\n                raise ValueError(\n                    f\"unsupported quantization mode: {self.quant_config.quant_mode}\"\n                )\n\n        return x, x_sf\n\n    def _supports_load_balancer(self) -> bool:\n        \"\"\"CutlassFusedMoE supports load balancer.\"\"\"\n        return True\n\n    def _get_quant_method(self):\n        if self.quant_config is not None and self.quant_config.layer_quant_mode.has_any_quant(\n                exclude_kv_cache=True):\n            if self.quant_config.layer_quant_mode.has_fp8_qdq():\n                return FP8QDQFusedMoEMethod()\n            elif self.quant_config.layer_quant_mode.has_fp8_block_scales():\n                return DeepSeekFP8BlockScalesFusedMoEMethod()\n            elif self.quant_config.layer_quant_mode.has_nvfp4():\n                return NVFP4CutlassFusedMoEMethod()\n            elif self.quant_config.layer_quant_mode.is_int4_weight_only_per_group(\n            ):\n                return WInt4AFP8FusedMoEMethod()\n            elif self.has_int8_woq_per_channel:\n                return INT8WoqPerChannelFusedMoEMethod()\n            elif self.quant_config.layer_quant_mode.has_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8():\n                return W4A8MXFP4FP8CutlassFusedMoEMethod()\n            elif self.quant_config.layer_quant_mode.has_w4a16_mxfp4():\n                return WFP4A16FusedMoEMethod()\n            elif self.quant_config.layer_quant_mode.has_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8():\n                return W4A8MXFP4MXFP8CutlassFusedMoEMethod()\n            else:\n                raise ValueError(\n                    f\"Unsupported quantization mode: {self.quant_config.quant_mode}\"\n                )\n        else:\n            return UnquantizedFusedMoEMethod()\n\n    def create_weights(self):\n        if self._weights_created:\n            return\n\n        self.quant_method = self._get_quant_method()\n        self.quant_method.create_weights(self)\n\n        self._weights_created = True\n        self._check_configs()\n\n    def supports_moe_output_in_alltoall_workspace(self):\n        return True\n\n    def run_moe(\n        self,\n        x: torch.Tensor,\n        token_selected_experts: torch.Tensor,\n        token_final_scales: torch.Tensor,\n        x_sf: Optional[torch.Tensor] = None,\n        is_sf_swizzled: bool = True,\n        output_dtype: Optional[torch.dtype] = None,\n        tuner_num_tokens: Optional[int] = None,\n        tuner_top_k: Optional[int] = None,\n        moe_output: Optional[torch.Tensor] = None,\n        enable_alltoall: Optional[bool] = None,\n    ) -> torch.Tensor:\n        \"\"\"\n        Run MoE computation with Cutlass backend.\n\n        This method encapsulates the core MoE computation logic, handling different\n        quantization schemes.\n\n        Args:\n            x: Input hidden states (may be pre-quantized)\n            token_selected_experts: Expert IDs or expert slots [num_tokens, top_k]\n                                   If EPLB is enabled, represents expert slots; otherwise expert IDs\n            token_final_scales: Final scaling factors for each token\n            x_sf: Input scale factors (optional, for certain quantization schemes)\n            is_sf_swizzled: Whether scaling factors are swizzled\n            output_dtype: Output data type (optional)\n            tuner_num_tokens: Number of tokens for profiling tuner (optional)\n            tuner_top_k: Top-k value for profiling tuner (optional)\n            moe_output: Pre-allocated output buffer (optional)\n            enable_alltoall: Whether alltoall communication is enabled (optional). If None, defaults to self.enable_alltoall.\n\n        Returns:\n            final_hidden_states: Output tensor from MoE computation\n        \"\"\"\n        # Determine weight dtype based on quantization mode\n        weight_dtype = self.w3_w1_weight.dtype\n        if self.has_any_quant:\n            if self.has_w4afp8:\n                weight_dtype = torch.quint4x2\n            elif self.has_w4a16_mxfp4:\n                weight_dtype = torch.uint8\n\n        if enable_alltoall is None:\n            enable_alltoall = self.enable_alltoall\n\n        result = torch.ops.trtllm.fused_moe(\n            x,\n            token_selected_experts,\n            token_final_scales,\n            self.w3_w1_weight.view(weight_dtype),\n            self.w3_w1_bias,\n            self.w2_weight.view(weight_dtype),\n            self.w2_bias,\n            output_dtype,\n            quant_scales=self.quant_scales,\n            input_sf=x_sf,\n            swizzled_input_sf=is_sf_swizzled,\n            swiglu_alpha=self.swiglu_alpha,\n            swiglu_beta=self.swiglu_beta,\n            swiglu_limit=self.swiglu_limit,\n            tp_size=self.tp_size,\n            tp_rank=self.tp_rank,\n            ep_size=self.ep_size,\n            ep_rank=self.ep_rank,\n            cluster_size=self.cluster_size,\n            cluster_rank=self.cluster_rank,\n            enable_alltoall=enable_alltoall,\n            use_deepseek_fp8_block_scale=self.has_deepseek_fp8_block_scales,\n            use_w4_group_scaling=self.has_w4afp8 or self.has_w4a16_mxfp4,\n            use_int8_woq_per_channel=self.has_int8_woq_per_channel,\n            use_mxfp8_act_scaling=self.has_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8,\n            min_latency_mode=False,\n            use_fused_finalize=self.use_fused_finalize,\n            tune_max_num_tokens=self.tune_max_num_tokens,\n            tuner_num_tokens=tuner_num_tokens,\n            tuner_top_k=tuner_top_k,\n            activation_type=self.activation_type,\n            unpadded_hidden_size=self.unpadded_hidden_size,\n            out_tensor=moe_output,\n        )\n        # When moe_output is provided, the result is written in-place and\n        # fused_moe returns empty list to avoid aliasing constraint violation.\n        # Otherwise, unpack the single tensor from the returned list.\n        if moe_output is not None:\n            final_hidden_states = moe_output\n        else:\n            final_hidden_states = result[0]\n\n        return final_hidden_states\n\n    def forward_chunk(\n            self,\n            x: Union[torch.Tensor, Fp4QuantizedTensor],\n            router_logits: torch.Tensor,\n            output_dtype: Optional[torch.dtype] = None,\n            all_rank_num_tokens: Optional[List[int]] = None,\n            use_dp_padding: Optional[bool] = None,\n            repeating_info: tuple = (True, True),\n    ) -> torch.Tensor:\n        if isinstance(x, Fp4QuantizedTensor):\n            assert output_dtype is not None\n        else:\n            output_dtype = x.dtype\n\n        is_first_call, is_last_call = repeating_info\n\n        self._load_balancer_start_wait_gpu_stage(is_first_call)\n\n        # apply routing\n        token_selected_experts, token_final_scales = self.routing_method.apply(\n            router_logits)\n        assert token_selected_experts.shape[\n            1] == self.routing_method.experts_per_token\n        assert token_selected_experts.shape == token_final_scales.shape\n        assert token_selected_experts.shape[0] == router_logits.shape[0]\n        assert token_final_scales.dtype == torch.float32\n        assert token_selected_experts.dtype == torch.int32\n\n        if self.layer_load_balancer:\n            self._load_balancer_done_wait_gpu_stage(is_first_call)\n            ignore_allreduce = self.enable_alltoall and self.alltoall_method_type in (\n                AlltoallMethodType.NVLinkTwoSided,\n                AlltoallMethodType.NVLinkOneSided,\n            )\n            self._load_balancer_update_statistic(\n                token_selected_experts,\n                is_first_call,\n                is_last_call,\n                ignore_allreduce=ignore_allreduce)\n            token_selected_slots = self._load_balancer_route(\n                token_selected_experts, self.use_dp)\n        else:\n            token_selected_slots = token_selected_experts\n\n        # If load balancer is disabled, the statistics are collected from expert IDs.\n        # If load balancer is enabled, the statistics are collected from expert slot IDs.\n        ExpertStatistic.set_layer(self.layer_idx)\n        ExpertStatistic.maybe_add_info(self.num_slots, token_selected_slots)\n        token_selected_slots = get_calibrator().maybe_collect_or_replay_slots(\n            self.num_slots, token_selected_slots)\n\n        if self.apply_router_weight_on_input:\n            assert x.dtype != torch.float8_e4m3fn, \"Current workaround for apply_router_weight_on_input does not support fp8 input\"\n            x = x * token_final_scales.to(x.dtype)\n            # TODO: remove this once we have correct fusedmoe kernel ready\n            token_final_scales = None\n\n        run_post_quant_allgather = self.use_dp and self.parallel_size > 1\n\n        # Quantize inputs using extracted method\n        # For post_quant_comm scenarios, x_sf will be reshaped to 2D inside quantize_input\n        post_quant_comm = run_post_quant_allgather or self.enable_alltoall\n        x, x_sf = self.quantize_input(x, post_quant_comm=post_quant_comm)\n\n        # Prepare additional information for profiling in case padding is applied when using alltoall.\n        # Only the non-alltoall case is considered for profiling in the warmup phase.\n        # Therefore, to get the correct tactics during the actual inference, the inputs to the tuner should be the same as when not using alltoall.\n        if self.enable_alltoall:\n            if all_rank_num_tokens is not None:\n                tuner_num_tokens = sum(all_rank_num_tokens)\n            else:\n                tuner_num_tokens = x.shape[0] * self.mapping.tp_size\n            tuner_top_k = token_selected_slots.shape[1]\n        else:\n            tuner_num_tokens = None\n            tuner_top_k = None\n\n        # Alltoall or allgather for attention DP\n        token_count = x.shape[0]\n        alltoall_info = None  # Store for later combine\n        is_sf_swizzled = True  # In case of post-quant communication, scaling factors will not be swizzled before communication, and swizzling after communication is merged into MoE.\n        if self.enable_alltoall:\n            assert all_rank_num_tokens is not None, \"all_rank_num_tokens required for alltoall\"\n            # Prepare alltoall indices\n            top_k = self.routing_method.experts_per_token\n            runtime_max_tokens_per_rank = max(\n                all_rank_num_tokens) if all_rank_num_tokens else token_count\n\n            # Handle case where token_final_scales might be None (when apply_router_weight_on_input=True)\n            if token_final_scales is None:\n                token_final_scales = torch.ones_like(token_selected_slots,\n                                                     dtype=torch.float32)\n\n            if self.alltoall_method_type == AlltoallMethodType.NVLinkTwoSided:\n                assert self.alltoall_prepare_workspace is not None, \"alltoall_prepare_workspace should be initialized\"\n                if is_last_call:\n                    loadbalancer_local_statistic_info = self._load_balancer_get_local_statistic_tensor(\n                    )\n                else:\n                    loadbalancer_local_statistic_info = None\n                alltoall_info, gathered_loadbalancer_local_statistic_info = MnnvlMoe.mnnvl_moe_alltoallv_prepare_without_allgather(\n                    token_selected_slots, loadbalancer_local_statistic_info,\n                    self.alltoall_prepare_workspace,\n                    runtime_max_tokens_per_rank, self.ep_rank, self.ep_size,\n                    self.num_experts, self.num_slots, top_k)\n                if gathered_loadbalancer_local_statistic_info is not None:\n                    gathered_loadbalancer_local_statistic_info = gathered_loadbalancer_local_statistic_info.view(\n                        (self.mapping.moe_ep_size, self.num_experts))\n                    self._load_balancer_update_statistic_with_gathered_statistic(\n                        gathered_loadbalancer_local_statistic_info)\n\n                # Dispatch x, x_sf, token_selected_slots, token_final_scales in one alltoall kernel\n                x, x_sf, token_selected_slots, token_final_scales = MnnvlMoe.mnnvl_moe_alltoallv(\n                    [x, x_sf, token_selected_slots, token_final_scales],\n                    alltoall_info, self.alltoall_workspace, self.ep_rank,\n                    self.ep_size)\n\n                torch.ops.trtllm.memset_expert_ids(\n                    token_selected_slots, alltoall_info.recv_rank_count_cumsum,\n                    runtime_max_tokens_per_rank, top_k, self.num_slots,\n                    self.ep_size)\n            elif self.alltoall_method_type == AlltoallMethodType.NVLinkOneSided:\n                # Python MoeAlltoAll path\n\n                payloads = []\n                payloads.append(x)\n                if x_sf is not None:\n                    payloads.append(x_sf)\n                    expert_id_payload_index = 2\n                else:\n                    expert_id_payload_index = 1\n                payloads.append(token_selected_slots)\n                payloads.append(token_final_scales)\n\n                loadbalancer_local_statistic_info = None\n                if self.layer_load_balancer and is_last_call:\n                    loadbalancer_local_statistic_info = self._load_balancer_get_local_statistic_tensor(\n                    )\n                if loadbalancer_local_statistic_info is not None:\n                    recv_tensors = self.moe_a2a.dispatch(\n                        token_selected_slots,\n                        payloads,\n                        runtime_max_tokens_per_rank,\n                        invalid_token_expert_id=self.\n                        num_slots,  # Caution: Cutlass MoE uses num_slots as invalid token expert id\n                        expert_id_payload_index=expert_id_payload_index,\n                        eplb_local_stats=loadbalancer_local_statistic_info,\n                    )\n                    gathered_stats = self.moe_a2a._state.eplb_gathered_stats\n                    self._load_balancer_update_statistic_with_gathered_statistic(\n                        gathered_stats)\n                else:\n                    recv_tensors = self.moe_a2a.dispatch(\n                        token_selected_slots,\n                        payloads,\n                        runtime_max_tokens_per_rank,\n                        invalid_token_expert_id=self.\n                        num_slots,  # Caution: Cutlass MoE uses num_slots as invalid token expert id\n                        expert_id_payload_index=expert_id_payload_index,\n                    )\n\n                if x_sf is not None:\n                    x_recv, x_sf_recv, token_selected_slots_recv, token_final_scales_recv = recv_tensors\n                    x_sf = x_sf_recv.view(-1, x_sf_recv.shape[-1])\n                else:\n                    x_recv, token_selected_slots_recv, token_final_scales_recv = recv_tensors\n                x = x_recv.view(-1, x_recv.shape[-1])\n                token_selected_slots = token_selected_slots_recv.view(\n                    -1, token_selected_slots_recv.shape[-1])\n                token_final_scales = token_final_scales_recv.view(\n                    -1, token_final_scales_recv.shape[-1])\n            else:\n                raise ValueError(\n                    f\"Unsupported moe alltoall method type: {self.alltoall_method_type}\"\n                )\n\n        elif run_post_quant_allgather:\n            # Original allgather logic\n            # x_sf is already 2D after quantize_input with post_quant_comm=True\n\n            x, x_sf, token_selected_slots, token_final_scales = allgather(\n                [x, x_sf, token_selected_slots, token_final_scales],\n                self.mapping,\n                dim=0,\n                sizes=None if use_dp_padding else all_rank_num_tokens)\n\n        # Optionally provide an output tensor to fused_moe so it writes directly to our buffer\n        moe_output: Optional[torch.Tensor] = None\n        if self.alltoall_method_type == AlltoallMethodType.NVLinkOneSided:\n            # Retrieve a workspace-backed output tensor sized by runtime tokens\n            runtime_max_tokens_per_rank = max(\n                all_rank_num_tokens) if all_rank_num_tokens else x.shape[0]\n            moe_output = self.moe_a2a.get_combine_payload_tensor_in_workspace(\n                runtime_max_tokens_per_rank, self.unpadded_hidden_size,\n                output_dtype)\n\n        # Call extracted run_moe method\n        final_hidden_states = self.run_moe(\n            x=x,\n            token_selected_experts=token_selected_slots,\n            token_final_scales=token_final_scales,\n            x_sf=x_sf,\n            is_sf_swizzled=not post_quant_comm,\n            output_dtype=output_dtype,\n            tuner_num_tokens=tuner_num_tokens,\n            tuner_top_k=tuner_top_k,\n            moe_output=moe_output,\n        )\n\n        self._load_balancer_start_set_cpu_stage(is_last_call)\n\n        # Combine results if using alltoall\n        if self.enable_alltoall:\n            if self.alltoall_method_type == AlltoallMethodType.NVLinkTwoSided:\n                if alltoall_info is not None:\n                    top_k = self.routing_method.experts_per_token\n                    final_hidden_states = MnnvlMoe.mnnvl_moe_alltoallv_combine(\n                        final_hidden_states,\n                        alltoall_info,\n                        self.alltoall_workspace,\n                        ep_rank=self.ep_rank,\n                        ep_size=self.ep_size,\n                        top_k=top_k,\n                        use_low_precision_combine=self.\n                        use_low_precision_combine,\n                        token_count=token_count)\n            elif self.alltoall_method_type == AlltoallMethodType.NVLinkOneSided:\n                output_hidden_size = final_hidden_states.shape[-1]\n                runtime_max_tokens_per_rank = max(\n                    all_rank_num_tokens) if all_rank_num_tokens else token_count\n                final_hidden_states = self.moe_a2a.combine(\n                    final_hidden_states.view(self.ep_size,\n                                             runtime_max_tokens_per_rank,\n                                             output_hidden_size),\n                    runtime_max_tokens_per_rank,\n                    payload_in_workspace=True)\n            else:\n                raise ValueError(\n                    f\"Unsupported moe alltoall method type: {self.alltoall_method_type}\"\n                )\n\n        self._load_balancer_done_set_cpu_stage(is_last_call)\n\n        return final_hidden_states\n\n    def split_chunk(self, split_token_num: int, split_num_chunks: int):\n        val_div = split_token_num // split_num_chunks\n        val_mod = split_token_num % split_num_chunks\n        split_chunk_size_list = [val_div + 1] * val_mod + [val_div] * (\n            split_num_chunks - val_mod)\n        return split_chunk_size_list\n\n    def forward_impl(\n        self,\n        x: Union[torch.Tensor, Fp4QuantizedTensor],\n        router_logits: torch.Tensor,\n        *,\n        do_finalize: bool = True,  # used by other MoE backends\n        output_dtype: Optional[torch.dtype] = None,\n        all_rank_num_tokens: Optional[List[int]] = None,\n        use_dp_padding: Optional[bool] = None,\n        **kwargs,\n    ) -> torch.Tensor:\n        assert do_finalize, \"CutlassFusedMoE does not support do_finalize=False\"\n        if self.use_dp and self.parallel_size > 1:\n            assert all_rank_num_tokens is not None\n            assert use_dp_padding is not None\n            num_rows = sum(all_rank_num_tokens)\n        else:\n            num_rows = x.shape[0]\n\n        if use_dp_padding:\n            all_rank_num_tokens_padded = [max(all_rank_num_tokens)\n                                          ] * len(all_rank_num_tokens)\n            num_rows = sum(all_rank_num_tokens_padded)\n        else:\n            all_rank_num_tokens_padded = all_rank_num_tokens\n\n        # in case of num_rows is larger than max_chunk_size, we need to split the input into multiple chunks\n        num_chunks = (num_rows + self.moe_max_num_tokens -\n                      1) // self.moe_max_num_tokens\n\n        if num_chunks == 1:\n            is_first_call = self.repeat_idx == 0\n            is_last_call = self.repeat_idx == self.repeat_count - 1\n            outputs = self.forward_chunk(\n                x,\n                router_logits,\n                output_dtype,\n                all_rank_num_tokens=all_rank_num_tokens_padded,\n                use_dp_padding=use_dp_padding,\n                repeating_info=(is_first_call, is_last_call))\n            outputs = self.reducescatter_or_allreduce(\n                outputs,\n                all_rank_num_tokens=all_rank_num_tokens_padded,\n                use_dp_padding=use_dp_padding)\n        else:\n            if self.use_dp:\n                all_rank_chunk_size_list = [\n                    self.split_chunk(val, num_chunks)\n                    for val in all_rank_num_tokens_padded\n                ]\n                all_rank_num_tokens_list = [[\n                    val[idx_chunk] for val in all_rank_chunk_size_list\n                ] for idx_chunk in range(num_chunks)]\n                chunk_size_list = all_rank_chunk_size_list[self.parallel_rank]\n            else:\n                all_rank_num_tokens_list = [None] * num_chunks\n                chunk_size_list = self.split_chunk(x.shape[0], num_chunks)\n\n            x_list = x.split(chunk_size_list)\n            router_logits_list = router_logits.split(chunk_size_list)\n\n            self.event_dict[EventType.Main].record()\n            with torch.cuda.stream(self.aux_stream):\n                self.event_dict[EventType.Main].wait()\n\n            def _forward_chunk(x_, router_logits_, idx):\n                is_first_call = idx == 0 and self.repeat_idx == 0\n                is_last_call = idx == num_chunks - 1 and self.repeat_idx == self.repeat_count - 1\n                return self.forward_chunk(\n                    x_,\n                    router_logits_,\n                    all_rank_num_tokens=all_rank_num_tokens_list[idx]\n                    if self.use_dp else None,\n                    use_dp_padding=use_dp_padding,\n                    repeating_info=(is_first_call, is_last_call))\n\n            def _reducescatter_or_allreduce(x_, idx):\n                return self.reducescatter_or_allreduce(\n                    x_,\n                    all_rank_num_tokens=all_rank_num_tokens_list[idx],\n                    use_dp_padding=use_dp_padding)\n\n            outputs_list = []\n            # Postpone reduce-scatter/all-reduce to the next iteration to achieve better overlap\n            for idx_chunk, (x, router_logits) in enumerate(\n                    zip(x_list, router_logits_list)):\n                if not (self.alltoall_method_type\n                        == AlltoallMethodType.NVLinkOneSided\n                        or self.alltoall_method_type\n                        == AlltoallMethodType.NVLinkTwoSided):\n                    if idx_chunk % 2 == 0:\n                        with torch.cuda.stream(self.aux_stream):\n                            outputs = _forward_chunk(x, router_logits,\n                                                     idx_chunk)\n                        if idx_chunk > 0:\n                            outputs_list[-1] = _reducescatter_or_allreduce(\n                                outputs_list[-1], idx_chunk - 1)\n                    else:\n                        outputs = _forward_chunk(x, router_logits, idx_chunk)\n                        with torch.cuda.stream(self.aux_stream):\n                            outputs_list[-1] = _reducescatter_or_allreduce(\n                                outputs_list[-1], idx_chunk - 1)\n                else:\n                    outputs = _forward_chunk(x, router_logits, idx_chunk)\n\n                outputs_list.append(outputs)\n\n            if not (self.alltoall_method_type\n                    == AlltoallMethodType.NVLinkOneSided\n                    or self.alltoall_method_type\n                    == AlltoallMethodType.NVLinkTwoSided):\n                if num_chunks % 2 == 0:\n                    outputs_list[-1] = _reducescatter_or_allreduce(\n                        outputs_list[-1], -1)\n                else:\n                    with torch.cuda.stream(self.aux_stream):\n                        outputs_list[-1] = _reducescatter_or_allreduce(\n                            outputs_list[-1], -1)\n                with torch.cuda.stream(self.aux_stream):\n                    self.event_dict[EventType.MoeChunkingOverlap].record()\n                self.event_dict[EventType.MoeChunkingOverlap].wait()\n\n            outputs = torch.cat(outputs_list)\n\n        if self.use_dp and self.parallel_size > 1:\n            rank = self.parallel_rank\n            outputs = outputs[:all_rank_num_tokens[rank]]\n        self.repeat_idx = 0 if self.repeat_idx == self.repeat_count - 1 else self.repeat_idx + 1\n        return outputs\n\n    def forward_fake(\n        self,\n        x: Union[torch.Tensor, Fp4QuantizedTensor],\n        router_logits: torch.Tensor,\n        *,\n        do_finalize: bool = True,\n        output_dtype: Optional[torch.dtype] = None,\n        all_rank_num_tokens: Optional[List[int]] = None,\n        use_dp_padding: Optional[bool] = None,\n        **kwargs,\n    ) -> Union[torch.Tensor, List[torch.Tensor]]:\n        return super().forward_fake(\n            x,\n            router_logits,\n            do_finalize=do_finalize,\n            output_dtype=output_dtype,\n            all_rank_num_tokens=all_rank_num_tokens,\n            use_dp_padding=use_dp_padding,\n            **kwargs,\n        )\n\n    def load_weights(self,\n                     weights: List[Dict],\n                     allow_partial_loading: bool = False):\n        assert self._weights_created\n        assert len(weights) == 1\n        weights = weights[0]\n\n        kargs = {}\n        if \"allow_partial_loading\" in inspect.getfullargspec(\n                self.quant_method.load_weights).args:\n            kargs[\"allow_partial_loading\"] = allow_partial_loading\n        self.quant_method.load_weights(self, weights, self.weight_loading_mode,\n                                       **kargs)\n\n    def post_load_weights(self):\n        self.quant_method.post_load_weights(self)\n",
  "replaceAll": false,
  "structuredPatch": [
    {
      "lines": [
        "                 return INT8WoqPerChannelFusedMoEMethod()",

  "file": {
    "content": "class W4A8MXFP4FP8CutlassFusedMoEMethod(MXFP4WeightCutlassFusedMoEMethod):\n\n    def create_weights(self, module: torch.nn.Module):\n        fc31_input_scale = nn.Parameter(torch.tensor(1., dtype=torch.float32),\n                                        requires_grad=False)\n        module.register_parameter(\"fc31_input_scale\", fc31_input_scale)\n\n        fc31_input_dequant = nn.Parameter(torch.empty(\n            module.expert_size_per_partition, dtype=torch.float32),\n                                          requires_grad=False)\n        module.register_parameter(\"fc31_input_dequant\", fc31_input_dequant)\n\n        fc2_input_scale = nn.Parameter(torch.tensor(1., dtype=torch.float32),\n                                       requires_grad=False)\n        module.register_parameter(\"fc2_input_scale\", fc2_input_scale)\n\n        fc2_input_dequant = nn.Parameter(torch.empty(\n            module.expert_size_per_partition, dtype=torch.float32),\n                                         requires_grad=False)\n        module.register_parameter(\"fc2_input_dequant\", fc2_input_dequant)\n\n        super().create_weights(module)\n\n        self._online_eplb_not_supported(module)\n\n        self.setup_quant_scales(module)\n\n    def load_expert_fc31_input_scale_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8(\n            self, w1_input_scale, w3_input_scale,\n            dst_fc31_input_scale: torch.Tensor):\n        w1_input_scale = w1_input_scale[...].reshape([])\n        assert torch.allclose(\n            w1_input_scale, w3_input_scale), \"w1_input_scale != w3_input_scale\"\n        dst_fc31_input_scale.copy_(w1_input_scale)\n\n    def load_expert_fc2_input_scale_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8(\n            self, w2_input_scale, dst_fc2_input_scale: torch.Tensor):\n        dst_fc2_input_scale.copy_(w2_input_scale[...].reshape([]))\n\n    def load_quant_scales(self, module: torch.nn.Module, weights: Dict):\n        # Step1: Load input scales.\n        tmp_fc31_input_scale = torch.empty(module.num_experts,\n                                           dtype=torch.float32)\n        tmp_fc2_input_scale = torch.empty(module.num_experts,\n                                          dtype=torch.float32)\n\n        for expert_id in range(module.num_experts):\n            if module.weight_loading_mode == MoEWeightLoadingMode.VANILLA:\n                w1_input_scale = weights[f\"{expert_id}.w1.input_scale\"]\n                w3_input_scale = weights[f\"{expert_id}.w3.input_scale\"]",

Output
{
  "file": {
    "content": "class W4A8MXFP4FP8CutlassFusedMoEMethod(MXFP4WeightCutlassFusedMoEMethod):\n\n    def create_weights(self, module: torch.nn.Module):\n        fc31_input_scale = nn.Parameter(torch.tensor(1., dtype=torch.float32),\n                                        requires_grad=False)\n        module.register_parameter(\"fc31_input_scale\", fc31_input_scale)\n\n        fc31_input_dequant = nn.Parameter(torch.empty(\n            module.expert_size_per_partition, dtype=torch.float32),\n                                          requires_grad=False)\n        module.register_parameter(\"fc31_input_dequant\", fc31_input_dequant)\n\n        fc2_input_scale = nn.Parameter(torch.tensor(1., dtype=torch.float32),\n                                       requires_grad=False)\n        module.register_parameter(\"fc2_input_scale\", fc2_input_scale)\n\n        fc2_input_dequant = nn.Parameter(torch.empty(\n            module.expert_size_per_partition, dtype=torch.float32),\n                                         requires_grad=False)\n        module.register_parameter(\"fc2_input_dequant\", fc2_input_dequant)\n\n        super().create_weights(module)\n\n        self._online_eplb_not_supported(module)\n\n        self.setup_quant_scales(module)\n\n    def load_expert_fc31_input_scale_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8(\n            self, w1_input_scale, w3_input_scale,\n            dst_fc31_input_scale: torch.Tensor):\n        w1_input_scale = w1_input_scale[...].reshape([])\n        assert torch.allclose(\n            w1_input_scale, w3_input_scale), \"w1_input_scale != w3_input_scale\"\n        dst_fc31_input_scale.copy_(w1_input_scale)\n\n    def load_expert_fc2_input_scale_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8(\n            self, w2_input_scale, dst_fc2_input_scale: torch.Tensor):\n        dst_fc2_input_scale.copy_(w2_input_scale[...].reshape([]))\n\n    def load_quant_scales(self, module: torch.nn.Module, weights: Dict):\n        # Step1: Load input scales.\n        tmp_fc31_input_scale = torch.empty(module.num_experts,\n                                           dtype=torch.float32)\n        tmp_fc2_input_scale = torch.empty(module.num_experts,\n                                          dtype=torch.float32)\n\n        for expert_id in range(module.num_experts):\n            if module.weight_loading_mode == MoEWeightLoadingMode.VANILLA:\n                w1_input_scale = weights[f\"{expert_id}.w1.input_scale\"]\n                w3_input_scale = weights[f\"{expert_id}.w3.input_scale\"]\n                w2_input_scale = weights[f\"{expert_id}.w2.input_scale\"]\n            elif module.weight_loading_mode == MoEWeightLoadingMode.FUSED_GATE_UP_PROJ:\n                w1_input_scale = weights[\"gate_up_proj_input_scale\"]\n                w3_input_scale = weights[\"gate_up_proj_input_scale\"]\n                w2_input_scale = weights[\"down_proj_input_scale\"]\n            else:\n                raise NotImplementedError(\n                    f\"Unknown weight loading mode in MoE: {module.weight_loading_mode}\"\n                )\n\n            self.load_expert_fc31_input_scale_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8(\n                w1_input_scale, w3_input_scale, tmp_fc31_input_scale[expert_id])\n            self.load_expert_fc2_input_scale_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8(\n                w2_input_scale, tmp_fc2_input_scale[expert_id])\n\n        # fc31_input_scale is the reciprocal of the maximum of all w1 input scales and w3 input scales.\n        module.fc31_input_scale.data.copy_(\n            tmp_fc31_input_scale.max().reciprocal())\n        module.fc31_input_dequant.data.copy_(tmp_fc31_input_scale.max())\n        # fc2_input_scale is the reciprocal of the maximum of all w2 input scales.\n        module.fc2_input_scale.data.copy_(\n            tmp_fc2_input_scale.max().reciprocal())\n        module.fc2_input_dequant.data.copy_(tmp_fc2_input_scale.max())\n\n        # Step2: Load weight block scales.\n        super().load_quant_scales(module, weights)\n\n    def setup_quant_scales(self, module: torch.nn.Module):\n        module.quant_scales = FusedMoEQuantScalesW4A8MXFP4FP8(\n            fc31_weight_block_scale=module.w3_w1_weight_scale,\n            fc31_dequant_scale=module.fc31_input_dequant,\n            fc2_input_scale=module.fc2_input_scale,\n            fc2_weight_block_scale=module.w2_weight_scale,\n            fc2_dequant_scale=module.fc2_input_dequant,\n        )\n\n\nclass MXFP4WeightTRTLLMGenFusedMoEMethod(MXFP4WeightFusedMoEMethod):\n    weight_dtype = torch.uint8\n    block_scales_dtype = torch.uint8\n    # TRTLLM-Gen backend requires weight elements to be 128 aligned in intermediate dimension\n    weight_alignment = 128\n    # Due to kernel implementation, we enforce the input hidden dimension to be multiple of 512,\n    # to allow as many kernel candidates as possible. We will relax alignment constraints in the future,\n    # but should be no less than 128-aligned as TMA hardware requires.\n    input_hidden_alignment = 512\n    intermediate_size_per_partition_lean: int = None\n\n    # Cache the permute indices during weight loading to avoid recompute\n    # This assumes the same input shape always results in the same permute indices\n    _cache_permute_indices: Dict[torch.Size, torch.Tensor] = {}\n\n    def create_weights(self, module: torch.nn.Module):\n        weight_vec_size = torch.iinfo(self.weight_dtype).bits // 4\n        block_scales_vec_size = torch.iinfo(self.block_scales_dtype).bits // 8\n\n        super().create_weights(module,\n                               self.weight_dtype,\n                               weight_vec_size,\n                               self.block_scales_dtype,\n                               block_scales_vec_size,\n                               self.weight_alignment,\n                               self.input_hidden_alignment,\n                               bias_dtype=torch.float32)\n\n    def setup_quant_scales(self, module: torch.nn.Module):\n        module.quant_scales = tuple()\n\n    def post_load_weights(self, module: torch.nn.Module):\n        super().post_load_weights(module)\n        # Create a proxy weight of unpadded size; dtype does not matter\n        w1_weight = torch.empty([module.intermediate_size, module.hidden_size])\n        # Calculate alignment\n        alignment = _get_weight_alignment(self.weight_alignment,\n                                          module.scaling_vector_size,\n                                          module.tp_size, w1_weight.shape[0])\n        # Pad the proxy weight\n        w1_weight = maybe_pad_for_mxfp4(w1_weight, self.input_hidden_alignment,\n                                        alignment)\n        # Get the slice range of each tp rank\n        _, w1_weight_shard_slice = load_weight_shard(w1_weight,\n                                                     module.tp_size,\n                                                     module.tp_rank,\n                                                     TensorParallelMode.COLUMN,\n                                                     return_slice_indices=True)\n\n        def slice_stop(slice: slice) -> int:\n            return slice.stop\n\n        def slice_start(slice: slice) -> int:\n            return slice.start or 0\n\n        # Keep the unpadded shape of each shard to be leveraged by kernels to avoid BW waste\n        shard_slice_indices = list(\n            zip(\n                w1_weight_shard_slice,\n                [module.intermediate_size, module.hidden_size],\n            ))\n        # Clamp the unpadded shape after shard\n        w1_weight_shard_shape_lean = [",

  "file": {
    "content": "class MXFP4WeightCutlassFusedMoEMethod(MXFP4WeightFusedMoEMethod):\n    weight_dtype = FUSED_MOE_MXFP4_WEIGHT_DTYPE\n    block_scales_dtype = FUSED_MOE_MXFP4_WEIGHT_BLOCK_SCALE_DTYPE\n    # Cutlass MoE backend requires weight elements to be 128 aligned.\n    weight_alignment = 128\n\n    def create_weights(self, module: torch.nn.Module):\n        weight_vec_size = torch.iinfo(self.weight_dtype).bits // 4\n        block_scales_vec_size = torch.iinfo(self.block_scales_dtype).bits // 8\n\n        super().create_weights(module, self.weight_dtype, weight_vec_size,\n                               self.block_scales_dtype, block_scales_vec_size,\n                               self.weight_alignment, self.weight_alignment)\n\n        self._online_eplb_not_verified(module)\n\n    def load_expert_w3_w1_weight(self, module: torch.nn.Module,\n                                 w1_weight: torch.Tensor,\n                                 w3_weight: torch.Tensor,\n                                 dst_w3_w1_weight: torch.Tensor):\n        # We pad before the sharding. This is done to avoid fractional scaling factors\n        # per shard.\n        #\n        # E.g. if we pad after the sharding, with intermediate_size = 2880,\n        # tp_size = 4, scaling_vector_size = 32, each shard gets 720 elements and\n        # 22.5 scaling factors. After padding, each shard gets 768 in\n        # intermediate_size, and 24 in scaling factors's intermediate_size.\n        # The 2nd rank will start loading the 23rd scaling factor,\n        # while it should've loaded 22nd for the first 16 elements only.\n        # We pad the weights before the sharding to avoid this issue.\n        alignment = _get_weight_alignment(self.weight_alignment,\n                                          module.scaling_vector_size,\n                                          module.tp_size, w1_weight.shape[0])\n        if len(w1_weight.shape) == 2:\n            # Pad weights\n            # We already satisfy alignment factor of 2 for we pack two MXFP4 into Uint8.\n            assert w1_weight.dtype == torch.uint8\n            w1_weight = maybe_pad_for_mxfp4(w1_weight,\n                                            self.weight_alignment // 2,\n                                            alignment)\n            assert w3_weight.dtype == torch.uint8\n            w3_weight = maybe_pad_for_mxfp4(w3_weight,\n                                            self.weight_alignment // 2,\n                                            alignment)\n        else:\n            # Pad bias.\n            assert len(w1_weight.shape) == 1\n            assert len(w3_weight.shape) == 1\n            w1_weight = maybe_pad_for_mxfp4(w1_weight, alignment)\n            w3_weight = maybe_pad_for_mxfp4(w3_weight, alignment)\n\n        w1_weight_shard = load_weight_shard(w1_weight, module.tp_size,\n                                            module.tp_rank,\n                                            TensorParallelMode.COLUMN)\n        w3_weight_shard = load_weight_shard(w3_weight, module.tp_size,\n                                            module.tp_rank,\n                                            TensorParallelMode.COLUMN)\n\n        w31_weight_shard = torch.cat([w3_weight_shard, w1_weight_shard], dim=0)\n        dst_w3_w1_weight.copy_(w31_weight_shard.view(dst_w3_w1_weight.dtype),\n                               non_blocking=True)\n\n    # Helper function\n    def load_expert_w2_weight(self, module: torch.nn.Module,\n                              w2_weight: torch.Tensor,\n                              dst_w2_weight: torch.Tensor):\n        \"\"\"\n        Load w2 weight for each expert.\n        Override this method if you need to preprocess the weights differently.\n        \"\"\"\n        shard_w2_weight_dim = 2 * w2_weight.shape[1] if len(\n            w2_weight.shape) == 2 else w2_weight.shape[0]\n        alignment = _get_weight_alignment(self.weight_alignment,\n                                          module.scaling_vector_size,\n                                          module.tp_size, shard_w2_weight_dim)\n\n        if len(w2_weight.shape) == 2:\n            assert w2_weight.dtype == torch.uint8\n            w2_weight = maybe_pad_for_mxfp4(w2_weight, alignment // 2,\n                                            self.weight_alignment)\n        else:\n            # Pad bias.\n            assert len(w2_weight.shape) == 1\n            w2_weight = maybe_pad_for_mxfp4(w2_weight, self.weight_alignment)\n\n        w2_weight_shard = load_weight_shard(w2_weight, module.tp_size,\n                                            module.tp_rank,\n                                            TensorParallelMode.ROW)\n\n        dst_w2_weight.copy_(w2_weight_shard.view(dst_w2_weight.dtype),\n                            non_blocking=True)\n\n    def load_expert_w3_w1_weight_scale_mxfp4(\n            self, module: torch.nn.Module, w1_weight_scale: torch.Tensor,\n            w3_weight_scale: torch.Tensor,\n            dst_w3_w1_weight_scale: torch.Tensor):\n        device = dst_w3_w1_weight_scale.device\n\n        alignment = _get_weight_alignment(self.weight_alignment,\n                                          module.scaling_vector_size,",

  "originalFile": "import inspect\nimport math\nfrom abc import ABC, abstractmethod\nfrom typing import Dict, List, NamedTuple, Optional, Union\n\nimport torch\nimport torch.nn.functional as F\nfrom torch import nn\n\nfrom tensorrt_llm._utils import get_sm_version, is_sm_100f\nfrom tensorrt_llm.logger import logger\nfrom tensorrt_llm.quantization.functional import \\\n    preprocess_weights_for_mixed_gemm\nfrom tensorrt_llm.quantization.utils.fp4_utils import (\n    float4_e2m1x2, float4_sf_dtype,\n    get_reorder_rows_for_gated_act_gemm_row_indices,\n    get_shuffle_matrix_a_row_indices, get_shuffle_matrix_sf_a_row_indices)\nfrom tensorrt_llm.quantization.utils.fp8_utils import (\n    resmooth_to_fp8_e8m0, transform_sf_into_required_layout)\n\nfrom ...utils import (replace_parameter_and_save_metadata, swizzle_sf,\n                      unswizzle_sf)\nfrom ..linear import TensorParallelMode, load_weight_shard\nfrom .interface import MoEWeightLoadingMode\n\n# The declarations aligns with moe_kernels.h\n# pack inputs into int64, e.g. 4 x bf16 input values\nFUSED_MOE_NVFP4_INPUT_DTYPE = torch.int64\n# pack weights into int64, e.g. 16 x nvfp4 weight values\nFUSED_MOE_NVFP4_WEIGHT_DTYPE = torch.int64\nFUSED_MOE_MXFP4_WEIGHT_DTYPE = torch.int64\n# pack weight block scales into int32, e.g. 4 x fp8 weight values\nFUSED_MOE_NVFP4_WEIGHT_BLOCK_SCALE_DTYPE = torch.int32\nFUSED_MOE_MXFP4_WEIGHT_BLOCK_SCALE_DTYPE = torch.int32\n\n\nclass FusedMoEQuantScalesFP8(NamedTuple):\n    fc1_dequant: torch.Tensor\n    fc2_quant: torch.Tensor\n    fc2_dequant: torch.Tensor\n    fc1_input_dequant: torch.Tensor\n\n\nclass FusedMoEQuantScalesDeepSeekFP8BlockScales(NamedTuple):\n    fc_weight_scales: torch.Tensor\n    proj_weight_scales: torch.Tensor\n\n\nclass FusedMoEQuantScalesNVFP4(NamedTuple):\n    fc1_act_global: torch.Tensor\n    fc1_weight_block: torch.Tensor\n    # fc1_global_scale = 1.0 / (fc1_weight_global_scale * fc1_act_global_scale)\n    fc1_global: torch.Tensor\n\n    fc2_act_global: torch.Tensor\n    fc2_weight_block: torch.Tensor\n    # fc2_global_scale = 1.0 / (fc2_weight_global_scale * fc2_act_global_scale)\n    fc2_global: torch.Tensor\n\n\nclass FusedMoEQuantScalesW4A8(NamedTuple):\n    scale_1_interleaved: torch.Tensor\n    scale_2_interleaved: torch.Tensor\n    pre_quant_scale_1: torch.Tensor\n    pre_quant_scale_2: torch.Tensor\n    zero_1: torch.Tensor\n    zero_2: torch.Tensor\n    alpha_1: torch.Tensor\n    alpha_2: torch.Tensor\n\n\nclass FusedMoEQuantScalesINT8WoqPerChannel(NamedTuple):\n    fc31_weight_scale: torch.Tensor\n    fc2_weight_scale: torch.Tensor\n\n\nclass FusedMoEQuantScalesW4A16MXFP4(NamedTuple):\n    scale_1_interleaved: torch.Tensor\n    scale_2_interleaved: torch.Tensor\n\n\nclass FusedMoEQuantScalesW4A8MXFP4FP8(NamedTuple):\n    fc31_weight_block_scale: torch.Tensor\n    fc31_dequant_scale: torch.Tensor\n    fc2_input_scale: torch.Tensor\n    fc2_weight_block_scale: torch.Tensor\n    fc2_dequant_scale: torch.Tensor\n\n\nclass FusedMoEQuantScalesW4A8MXFP4MXFP8(NamedTuple):\n    fc31_weight_block_scale: torch.Tensor\n    fc31_dequant_scale: torch.Tensor\n    fc2_weight_block_scale: torch.Tensor\n    fc2_dequant_scale: torch.Tensor\n\n\ndef trtllmgen_maybe_get_cached_w3_w1_permute_indices(\n        dst_w3_w1_weight: torch.Tensor,\n        cache_permute_indices: Dict[tuple[tuple[int, int, int], str],\n                                    torch.Tensor],\n        epilogue_tile_m: int,\n        num_elts_per_sf: Union[None, int] = None,\n        is_gated_act_gemm: bool = True) -> torch.Tensor:\n    key = (dst_w3_w1_weight.shape, \"w31\", int(num_elts_per_sf or -1))\n\n    if key not in cache_permute_indices:\n        # Get permute indices and chain them together\n        if is_gated_act_gemm:\n            permute0 = get_reorder_rows_for_gated_act_gemm_row_indices(\n                dst_w3_w1_weight)\n        else:\n            permute0 = torch.arange(dst_w3_w1_weight.shape[0], dtype=torch.long)\n        if num_elts_per_sf is None:\n            permute1 = get_shuffle_matrix_a_row_indices(\n                dst_w3_w1_weight, epilogue_tile_m=epilogue_tile_m)\n        else:\n            permute1 = get_shuffle_matrix_sf_a_row_indices(\n                dst_w3_w1_weight,\n                epilogue_tile_m=epilogue_tile_m,\n                num_elts_per_sf=num_elts_per_sf)\n        # Memoize permute indices as recompute is **very** costly\n        cache_permute_indices[key] = permute0[permute1].to(\n            dst_w3_w1_weight.device)\n    permute_indices = cache_permute_indices[key]\n    return permute_indices\n\n\ndef trtllmgen_maybe_get_cached_w2_permute_indices(\n        dst_w2_weight: torch.Tensor,\n        cache_permute_indices: Dict[tuple[tuple[int, int, int], str],\n                                    torch.Tensor],\n        epilogue_tile_m: int,\n        num_elts_per_sf: Union[None, int] = None) -> torch.Tensor:\n    key = (dst_w2_weight.shape, \"w2\", int(num_elts_per_sf or -1))\n    if key not in cache_permute_indices:\n        if num_elts_per_sf is None:\n            permute_indices = (get_shuffle_matrix_a_row_indices(\n                dst_w2_weight, epilogue_tile_m).to(dst_w2_weight.device))\n        else:\n            permute_indices = (get_shuffle_matrix_sf_a_row_indices(\n                dst_w2_weight,\n                epilogue_tile_m=epilogue_tile_m,\n                num_elts_per_sf=num_elts_per_sf).to(dst_w2_weight.device))\n        # Memoize permute indices as recompute is **very** costly\n        cache_permute_indices[key] = permute_indices\n    permute_indices = cache_permute_indices[key]\n    return permute_indices\n\n\ndef maybe_pad_for_mxfp4(weight: torch.Tensor,\n                        col_alignment: int,\n                        row_alignment: Optional[int] = None) -> torch.Tensor:\n    col_pad_size = (col_alignment - weight.shape[-1]) % col_alignment\n    if row_alignment:\n        row_pad_size = (row_alignment - weight.shape[-2]) % row_alignment\n        weight = F.pad(weight, (0, col_pad_size, 0, row_pad_size))\n    else:\n        weight = F.pad(weight, (0, col_pad_size))\n    return weight\n\n\ndef interleave_linear_and_gate(x: torch.Tensor,\n                               group_size: int = 64,\n                               dim: int = -1) -> torch.Tensor:\n    sizes = x.size()\n    dim = dim % x.dim()\n    assert sizes[dim] % (group_size * 2) == 0\n    prev_sizes = sizes[:dim]\n    post_sizes = sizes[dim + 1:]\n    x = x.view(*prev_sizes, 2, sizes[dim] // (group_size * 2), group_size,\n               *post_sizes)\n    x = x.transpose(dim, dim + 1).contiguous().view(*sizes)\n    return x\n\n\nclass FusedMoEMethodBase(ABC):\n    \"\"\"\n    Base class for all fused MoE methods.\n    \"\"\"\n    weight_alignment: int = 1\n\n    @classmethod\n    def need_load_shared_weights(cls, module):\n        if hasattr(\n                module, \"layer_load_balancer\"\n        ) and module.layer_load_balancer and module.layer_load_balancer.need_load_shared_weights(\n        ):\n            return True\n        else:\n            return False\n\n    @classmethod\n    def _online_eplb_not_supported(cls, module):\n        if cls.need_load_shared_weights(module):\n            raise NotImplementedError(\n                f'{cls.__name__} doesn\\'t support online EPLB now')\n\n    @classmethod\n    def _online_eplb_not_verified(cls, module):\n        if cls.need_load_shared_weights(module):\n            logger.warning(f'{cls.__name__} online EPLB is not verified yet')\n\n    def create_weights(\n        self,\n        module: torch.nn.Module,\n        weight_dtype: torch.dtype,\n        w3_w1_weight_shape: tuple[int, int, int],\n        w2_weight_shape: tuple[int, int, int],\n        bias_dtype: Optional[torch.dtype] = None,\n        w3_w1_bias_shape: Optional[tuple[int, int]] = None,\n        w2_bias_shape: Optional[tuple[int, int]] = None,\n    ):\n        # Fused gate_up_proj (column parallel)\n        w3_w1_weight = nn.Parameter(torch.empty(w3_w1_weight_shape,\n                                                dtype=weight_dtype),\n                                    requires_grad=False)\n        module.register_parameter(\"w3_w1_weight\", w3_w1_weight)\n\n        # down_proj (row parallel)\n        w2_weight = nn.Parameter(torch.empty(w2_weight_shape,\n                                             dtype=weight_dtype),\n                                 requires_grad=False)\n        module.register_parameter(\"w2_weight\", w2_weight)\n\n        # bias\n        if module.bias:\n            # The shape might be padded so we use weight shape[:2]\n            if w3_w1_bias_shape is None:\n                w3_w1_bias_shape = w3_w1_weight_shape[:2]\n            if w2_bias_shape is None:\n                w2_bias_shape = w2_weight_shape[:2]\n            bias_dtype = bias_dtype or module.dtype\n            w3_w1_bias = nn.Parameter(torch.empty(w3_w1_bias_shape,\n                                                  dtype=bias_dtype),\n                                      requires_grad=False)\n            module.register_parameter(\"w3_w1_bias\", w3_w1_bias)\n\n            w2_bias = nn.Parameter(torch.empty(w2_bias_shape, dtype=bias_dtype),\n                                   requires_grad=False)\n            module.register_parameter(\"w2_bias\", w2_bias)\n        else:\n            module.w3_w1_bias = None\n            module.w2_bias = None\n\n        module.rebuild_tensor_metadata = {}\n\n    def load_expert_weights_to_dst(\n            self,\n            module: torch.nn.Module,\n            weights: List[Dict],\n            weight_loading_mode: MoEWeightLoadingMode,\n            load_expert_ids: List[int],\n            dst_w3_w1_weights_tensor: torch.Tensor,\n            dst_w2_weights_tensor: torch.Tensor,\n            dst_w3_w1_bias_tensor: Optional[torch.Tensor],\n            dst_w2_bias_tensor: Optional[torch.Tensor],\n            allow_partial_loading: bool = False):\n        w3_w1_kargs = {}\n        w2_kargs = {}\n        w3_w1_args = inspect.getfullargspec(self.load_expert_w3_w1_weight).args\n        w2_args = inspect.getfullargspec(self.load_expert_w2_weight).args\n        if \"allow_partial_loading\" in w3_w1_args:\n            w3_w1_kargs[\"allow_partial_loading\"] = allow_partial_loading\n        if \"allow_partial_loading\" in w2_args:\n            w2_kargs[\"allow_partial_loading\"] = allow_partial_loading\n        # Multithread weight load is superseded by prefetch_files() in model_engine.py\n        # Also, threading adds overhead in order to protect shuffle index cache with critical section.\n        for local_slot_id, expert_id in enumerate(load_expert_ids):\n            # expert_idx is the local slot index of current rank\n            expert_idx = local_slot_id\n\n            if weight_loading_mode in [\n                    MoEWeightLoadingMode.VANILLA,\n                    MoEWeightLoadingMode.W4A8_CUSTOM\n            ]:\n                w1_weight = weights[\n                    f\"{expert_id}.w1.weight\"] if f\"{expert_id}.w1.weight\" in weights else None\n                w3_weight = weights[\n                    f\"{expert_id}.w3.weight\"] if f\"{expert_id}.w3.weight\" in weights else None\n                w2_weight = weights[\n                    f\"{expert_id}.w2.weight\"] if f\"{expert_id}.w2.weight\" in weights else None\n                if module.bias:\n                    w1_bias = weights[\n                        f\"{expert_id}.w1.bias\"] if f\"{expert_id}.w1.bias\" in weights else None\n                    w3_bias = weights[\n                        f\"{expert_id}.w3.bias\"] if f\"{expert_id}.w3.bias\" in weights else None\n                    w2_bias = weights[\n                        f\"{expert_id}.w2.bias\"] if f\"{expert_id}.w2.bias\" in weights else None\n            elif weight_loading_mode == MoEWeightLoadingMode.FUSED_GATE_UP_PROJ:\n                w1_weight, w3_weight = None, None\n                if \"gate_up_proj\" in weights:\n                    w1_w3_weight = weights[\"gate_up_proj\"][expert_id].transpose(\n                        0, 1)\n                    w1_weight, w3_weight = w1_w3_weight.chunk(2, dim=0)\n                w2_weight = weights[\"down_proj\"][expert_id].transpose(\n                    0, 1).contiguous() if \"down_proj\" in weights else None\n                if module.bias:\n                    w1_bias, w3_bias = None, None\n                    if \"gate_up_proj.bias\" in weights:\n                        w1_w3_bias = weights[\"gate_up_proj.bias\"][expert_id]\n                        w1_bias, w3_bias = w1_w3_bias.chunk(2, dim=0)\n                    if \"down_proj.bias\" in weights:\n                        w2_bias = weights[\"down_proj.bias\"][expert_id]\n            else:\n                raise NotImplementedError(\n                    f\"Unknown weight loading mode in MoE: {weight_loading_mode}\"\n                )\n\n            self.load_expert_w3_w1_weight(module, w1_weight, w3_weight,\n                                          dst_w3_w1_weights_tensor[expert_idx],\n                                          **w3_w1_kargs)\n\n            self.load_expert_w2_weight(module, w2_weight,\n                                       dst_w2_weights_tensor[expert_idx],\n                                       **w2_kargs)\n            unmap_weights = [\n                weight for weight in [w1_weight, w3_weight, w2_weight]\n                if weight is not None\n            ]\n
