License at\n *\n *     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0\n *\n * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software\n * distributed under the License is distributed on an \"AS IS\" BASIS,\n * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.\n * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and\n * limitations under the License.\n */\n\n#pragma once\n\n#include \"tensorrt_llm/common/config.h\"\n\n#include <cstdint>\n#include <optional>\n#include <string>\n\nTRTLLM_NAMESPACE_BEGIN\n\nnamespace common\n{\n\nclass QuantMode\n{\n    // [WARNING] KEEP BELOW DEFINITION IN SYNC WITH tensorrt_llm/quantization/mode.py\npublic:\n    using BaseType = std::uint32_t;\n\n    explicit constexpr QuantMode(BaseType value) noexcept\n        : mValue{value}\n    {\n    }\n\n    QuantMode() noexcept = default;\n\n    constexpr QuantMode(QuantMode const&) noexcept = default;\n\n    constexpr QuantMode& operator=(QuantMode const& other) noexcept = default;\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode none() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(0));\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode int4Weights() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 0);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode int8Weights() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 1);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode activations() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 2);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode perChannelScaling() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 3);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode perTokenScaling() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 4);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode perGroupScaling() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 5);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode int8KvCache() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 6);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode fp8KvCache() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 7);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode fp8Qdq() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 8);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode fp8RowWise() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 3 | BaseType(1u) << 4 | BaseType(1u) << 9);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode fp8BlockScales() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 10);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode w4a8QServe() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 11);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode nvfp4() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 12);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode fp4KvCache() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 13);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode w4a8Nvfp4Fp8() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 14);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode w4a8Mxfp4Fp8() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 15);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode w4a8Mxfp4Int8() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 16);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode w4a8Mxfp4Mxfp8() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 17);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode w4a16Mxfp4() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 18);\n    }\n\n    constexpr BaseType value() const noexcept\n    {\n        return mValue;\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool isSet(QuantMode const& mode) const noexcept\n    {\n        return (mValue & mode.value()) == mode.value();\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasInt4Weights() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(int4Weights());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasInt8Weights() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(int8Weights());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasActivations() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(activations());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasPerChannelScaling() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(perChannelScaling());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasPerTokenScaling() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(perTokenScaling());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasPerGroupScaling() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(perGroupScaling());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasStaticActivationScaling() const noexcept\n    {\n        return !hasPerTokenScaling();\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasInt8KvCache() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(int8KvCache());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasFp8KvCache() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(fp8KvCache());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasFp4KvCache() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(fp4KvCache());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasFp8Qdq() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(fp8Qdq());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasFp8RowWise() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(fp8RowWise());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasNvfp4() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(nvfp4());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasW4a8Nvfp4Fp8() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(w4a8Nvfp4Fp8());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasW4a8Mxfp4Fp8() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(w4a8Mxfp4Fp8());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasW4a8Mxfp4Int8() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(w4a8Mxfp4Int8());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasW4a8Mxfp4Mxfp8() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(w4a8Mxfp4Mxfp8());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasW4a16Mxfp4() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(w4a16Mxfp4());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasKvCacheQuant() const noexcept\n    {\n        return hasInt8KvCache() || hasFp8KvCache() || hasFp4KvCache();\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode fromDescription(bool quantizeWeights, bool quantizeActivations, bool perToken,\n        bool perChannel, bool perGroup, bool useInt4Weights, bool useInt8KvCache, bool useFp8KvCache, bool useFp8Qdq,\n        bool useFp8RowWise, bool useW4a8QServe, bool useFp4Quant, bool useFp8BlockScales, bool useW4a8Nvfp4Fp8,\n        bool useW4a8Mxfp4Fp8, bool useW4a8Mxfp4Int8, bool useW4a8Mxfp4Mxfp8, bool useW4a16Mxfp4)\n    {\n        QuantMode quantMode{};\n        if (quantizeWeights)\n        {\n            if (useInt4Weights)\n                quantMode += int4Weights();\n            else\n                quantMode += int8Weights();\n        }\n\n        if (quantizeActivations)\n        {\n            quantMode += activations();\n        }\n\n        if (perChannel)\n        {\n            quantMode += QuantMode::perChannelScaling();\n        }\n        if (perToken)\n        {\n            quantMode += QuantMode::perTokenScaling();\n        }\n        if (perGroup)\n        {\n            quantMode += QuantMode::perGroupScaling();\n        }\n\n        if (useInt8KvCache)\n        {\n            quantMode += int8KvCache();\n        }\n\n        if (useFp8KvCache)\n        {\n            quantMode += fp8KvCache();\n        }\n\n        if (useFp8Qdq)\n        {\n            quantMode += fp8Qdq();\n        }\n\n        if (useFp8RowWise)\n        {\n            quantMode += fp8RowWise();\n        }\n\n        if (useFp8BlockScales)\n        {\n            quantMode += fp8BlockScales();\n        }\n\n        if (useW4a8QServe)\n        {\n            quantMode += w4a8QServe();\n        }\n\n        if (useFp4Quant)\n        {\n            quantMode += nvfp4();\n        }\n\n        if (useW4a8Nvfp4Fp8)\n        {\n            quantMode += w4a8Nvfp4Fp8();\n        }\n\n        if (useW4a8Mxfp4Fp8)\n        {\n            quantMode += w4a8Mxfp4Fp8();\n        }\n\n        if (useW4a8Mxfp4Int8)\n        {\n            quantMode += w4a8Mxfp4Int8();\n        }\n\n        if (useW4a8Mxfp4Mxfp8)\n        {\n            quantMode += w4a8Mxfp4Mxfp8();\n        }\n\n        if (useW4a16Mxfp4)\n        {\n            quantMode += w4a16Mxfp4();\n        }\n\n        return quantMode;\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode useSmoothQuant(bool perToken = false, bool perChannel = false)\n    {\n        return fromDescription(true, true, perToken, perChannel, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false,\n            false, false, false, false, false, false);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode useQServe(bool perGroup)\n    {\n        return fromDescription(true, true, false, false, perGroup, true, false, false, false, false, true, false, false,\n            false, false, false, false, false);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode useWeightOnly(bool useInt4Weights = false, bool perGroup = false)\n    {\n        return fromDescription(true, false, false, false, perGroup, useInt4Weights, false, false, false, false, false,\n            false, false, false, false, false, false, false);\n    }\n\n    static QuantMode const fromQuantAlgo(\n        std::optional<std::string> quantAlgo = std::nullopt, std::optional<std::string> kvCacheQuantAlgo = std::nullopt)\n    {\n        QuantMode quantMode{};\n        if (quantAlgo == \"W8A16\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useWeightOnly(false, false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W4A16\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useWeightOnly(true, false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W4A16_AWQ\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useWeightOnly(true, true);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W4A8_AWQ\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useWeightOnly(true, true);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W4A8_QSERVE_PER_GROUP\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useQServe(false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W4A8_QSERVE_PER_CHANNEL\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useQServe(true);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W4A16_GPTQ\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useWeightOnly(true, true);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W8A8_SQ_PER_CHANNEL\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useSmoothQuant(false, true);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W8A8_SQ_PER_TENSOR_PLUGIN\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useSmoothQuant(false, false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W8A8_SQ_PER_CHANNEL_PER_TOKEN_PLUGIN\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useSmoothQuant(true, true);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W8A8_SQ_PER_CHANNEL_PER_TENSOR_PLUGIN\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useSmoothQuant(false, true);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W8A8_SQ_PER_TENSOR_PER_TOKEN_PLUGIN\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useSmoothQuant(true, false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"FP8\")\n        {\n            quantMode = fromDescription(false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, true, false, false,\n                false, false, false, false, false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"FP8_ROWWISE\")\n        {\n            quantMode = fromDescription(false, false, true, true, false, false, false, false, false, true, false, false,\n                false, false, false, false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"FP4\")\n        {\n            quantMode = fromDescription(false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false,\n                true, false, false, false, false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"FP8_BLOCK_SCALES\")\n        {\n            quantMode = fromDescription(false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false,\n                false, true, false, false, false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W4A8_MXFP4_FP8\")\n        {\n            quantMode = fromDescription(false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false,\n                false, false, true, false, false, false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W4A8_MXFP4_INT8\")\n        {\n            quantMode = fromDescription(false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false,\n                false, false, false, true, false, false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8\")\n        {\n            quantMode = fromDescription(false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false,\n                false, false, false, false, true, false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W4A16_MXFP4\")\n        {\n            quantMode = fromDescription(false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false,\n                false, false, false, false, false, true);\n        }\n\n        if (kvCacheQuantAlgo == \"INT8\")\n        {\n            quantMode += int8KvCache();\n        }\n        else if (kvCacheQuantAlgo == \"FP8\")\n        {\n            quantMode += fp8KvCache();\n        }\n        else if (kvCacheQuantAlgo == \"NVFP4\")\n        {\n            quantMode += fp4KvCache();\n        }\n\n        return quantMode;\n    }\n\n    constexpr QuantMode operator+(QuantMode const& other) const noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(mValue | other.mValue);\n    }\n\n    constexpr QuantMode& operator+=(QuantMode const& other) noexcept\n    {\n        return *this = *this + other;\n    }\n\n    constexpr QuantMode operator-(QuantMode const& other) const noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(mValue & ~other.mValue);\n    }\n\n    constexpr QuantMode& operator-=(QuantMode const& other) noexcept\n    {\n        return *this = *this - other;\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool operator==(QuantMode const& other) const noexcept\n    {\n        return mValue == other.mValue;\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool operator!=(QuantMode const& other) const noexcept\n    {\n        return !(*this == other);\n    }\n\nprivate:\n    BaseType mValue{0};\n};\n\nclass GroupwiseQuantAlgo\n{\n    // Keep align with tensorrt_llm/quantization/mode.py\npublic:\n    static constexpr int BIAS = int(1) << 0;\n    static constexpr int ZERO = int(1) << 1;\n    static constexpr int PRE_QUANT_SCALE = int(1) << 2;\n    static constexpr int FP8_ALPHA = int(1) << 3;\n    static constexpr int INT8_WEIGHT = int(1) << 4;\n};\n\n} // namespace common\n\nTRTLLM_NAMESPACE_END\n",

{
  "filePath": "/workspace/tests/unittest/trt/quantization/test_mode.py",
  "newString": "    def test_count(self):\n        # Make sure the COUNT value is as expected - change that test if you add a new flag.\n        self.assertEqual(QuantMode.COUNT.value, 1 << 19)",
  "oldString": "    def test_count(self):\n        # Make sure the COUNT value is as expected - change that test if you add a new flag.\n        self.assertEqual(QuantMode.COUNT.value, 1 << 18)",
  "originalFile": "# SPDX-FileCopyrightText: Copyright (c) 2022-2024 NVIDIA CORPORATION & AFFILIATES. All rights reserved.\n# SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n#\n# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the \"License\");\n# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.\n# You may obtain a copy of the License at\n#\n# http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0\n#\n# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software\n# distributed under the License is distributed on an \"AS IS\" BASIS,\n# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.\n# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and\n# limitations under the License.\nimport unittest\n\nfrom tensorrt_llm.quantization import QuantMode\n\n\nclass TestQuantMode(unittest.TestCase):\n\n    def test_all(self):\n        # Set activations and weights flags.\n        qm = QuantMode.ACTIVATIONS | QuantMode.INT8_WEIGHTS\n\n        # Make sure _all returns True when asked for both ACTIVATIONS and INT8_WEIGHTS.\n        self.assertTrue(qm._all(QuantMode.ACTIVATIONS | QuantMode.INT8_WEIGHTS))\n        # Make sure _all returns False when asked only for ACTIVATIONS.\n        self.assertFalse(qm._all(QuantMode.ACTIVATIONS))\n        # Make sure _all returns True when asked only for ACTIVATIONS if limited to ACTIVATIONS flag.\n        self.assertTrue(\n            qm._all(QuantMode.ACTIVATIONS, mask=QuantMode.ACTIVATIONS))\n\n    def test_any(self):\n        # Set activations and weights flags.\n        qm = QuantMode.ACTIVATIONS | QuantMode.INT8_WEIGHTS\n\n        # Make sure _any returns True when asked for both ACTIVATIONS and INT8_WEIGHTS.\n        self.assertTrue(qm._any(QuantMode.ACTIVATIONS | QuantMode.INT8_WEIGHTS))\n        # Make sure _any returns True when asked only for ACTIVATIONS.\n        self.assertTrue(qm._any(QuantMode.ACTIVATIONS))\n        # Make sure _any returns False when asked for PER_TOKEN.\n        self.assertFalse(qm._any(QuantMode.PER_TOKEN))\n\n    def test_count(self):\n        # Make sure the COUNT value is as expected - change that test if you add a new flag.\n        self.assertEqual(QuantMode.COUNT.value, 1 << 18)\n\n    def test_from_description(self):\n        # Test weight only.\n        qm = QuantMode.from_description(True, False, False, False)\n        # Make sure only the INT8_WEIGHTS flag is set.\n        self.assertEqual(qm, QuantMode.INT8_WEIGHTS)\n\n        # Test weight only.\n        qm = QuantMode.use_weight_only()\n        # Make sure only the INT8_WEIGHTS flag is set.\n        self.assertEqual(qm, QuantMode.INT8_WEIGHTS)\n\n        # Test weight only (int4).\n        qm = QuantMode.from_description(True, False, False, False, False, True)\n        # Make sure only the INT4_WEIGHTS flag is set.\n        self.assertEqual(qm, QuantMode.INT4_WEIGHTS)\n\n        # Test weight only.\n        qm = QuantMode.use_weight_only(use_int4_weights=True)\n        # Make sure only the INT4_WEIGHTS flag is set.\n        self.assertEqual(qm, QuantMode.INT4_WEIGHTS)\n\n        # Test activation/weight per-tensor.\n        qm = QuantMode.from_description(True, True, False, False)\n        # The reference.\n        expected_qm = QuantMode.ACTIVATIONS | QuantMode.INT8_WEIGHTS\n        # Make sure ACTIVATIONS and INT8_WEIGHTS flags are set.\n        self.assertEqual(qm, expected_qm)\n\n        # Test activation/weight per-tensor.\n        qm = QuantMode.use_smooth_quant()\n        # Make sure ACTIVATIONS and INT8_WEIGHTS flags are set.\n        self.assertEqual(qm, expected_qm)\n\n        # Test activation/weight per-tensor & per-channel.\n        qm = QuantMode.from_description(True, True, False, True)\n        # The reference.\n        expected_qm = expected_qm | QuantMode.PER_CHANNEL\n        # Make sure ACTIVATIONS, INT8_WEIGHTS and PER_CHANNEL flags are set.\n        self.assertEqual(qm, expected_qm)\n\n        # Test activation/weight per-tensor & per-channel.\n        qm = QuantMode.use_smooth_quant(per_channel=True)\n        # Make sure ACTIVATIONS, INT8_WEIGHTS and PER_CHANNEL flags are set.\n        self.assertEqual(qm, expected_qm)\n\n        # Test activation/weight per-token & per-channel.\n        qm = QuantMode.from_description(True, True, True, True)\n        # The expected result.\n        expected_qm = expected_qm | QuantMode.PER_TOKEN\n        # Make sure all flags are set.\n        self.assertEqual(qm, expected_qm)\n\n        # Test activation/weight per-token & per-channel.\n        qm = QuantMode.use_smooth_quant(True, True)\n        # Make sure all flags are set.\n        self.assertEqual(qm, expected_qm)\n\n    def test_per_channel(self):\n        # Set per-channel flag.\n        qm = QuantMode.ACTIVATIONS | QuantMode.INT8_WEIGHTS | QuantMode.PER_CHANNEL\n        # Make sure it returns True for per-channel.\n        self.assertTrue(qm.has_per_channel_scaling())\n        # Do not set per-channel flag.\n        qm = QuantMode.ACTIVATIONS | QuantMode.INT8_WEIGHTS\n        # Make sure it returns False for per-channel.\n        self.assertFalse(qm.has_per_channel_scaling())\n\n    def test_per_token(self):\n        # Set per-token flag.\n        qm = QuantMode.ACTIVATIONS | QuantMode.INT8_WEIGHTS | QuantMode.PER_TOKEN\n        # Make sure it returns True for per-token.\n        self.assertTrue(qm.has_per_token_dynamic_scaling())\n        # Make sure it returns False for per-tensor.\n        self.assertFalse(qm.has_act_static_scaling())\n\n        # Do not set per-token flag.\n        qm = QuantMode.ACTIVATIONS | QuantMode.INT8_WEIGHTS\n        # Make sure it returns False for per-token.\n        self.assertFalse(qm.has_per_token_dynamic_scaling())\n        # Make sure it returns True for per-tensor.\n        self.assertTrue(qm.has_act_static_scaling())\n\n    def test_weights_only(self):\n        # Set weights flags.\n        qm = QuantMode.INT8_WEIGHTS\n        # Make sure it returns True for weight-only.\n        self.assertTrue(qm.is_weight_only())\n        # Make sure it returns True for weight-only.\n        self.assertTrue(qm.is_int8_weight_only())\n\n        # Set weights flags.\n        qm = QuantMode.INT4_WEIGHTS\n        # Make sure it returns True for weight-only.\n        self.assertTrue(qm.is_weight_only())\n        # Make sure it returns True for weight-only.\n        self.assertTrue(qm.is_int4_weight_only())\n\n        # Set activations and weights flags.\n        qm = QuantMode.ACTIVATIONS | QuantMode.INT8_WEIGHTS\n        # Make sure it returns False for weight-only.\n        self.assertFalse(qm.is_weight_only())\n\n    def test_int8_kv_cache(self):\n        # Set int8 kv cache flags.\n        qm = QuantMode.INT8_KV_CACHE\n        # Make sure it returns True for kv_cache.\n        self.assertTrue(qm.has_int8_kv_cache())\n        # Make sure it returns True for any quantization.\n        self.assertTrue(qm.has_any_quant())\n\n        # Set weights flags.\n        qm = QuantMode.INT8_WEIGHTS\n        # Make sure it returns True for any quantization.\n        self.assertTrue(qm.has_any_quant())\n        # Set int8 KV cache flag.\n        qm = qm.set_int8_kv_cache()\n        # Make sure it returns True for kv_cache.\n        self.assertTrue(qm.has_int8_kv_cache())\n        # Make sure it returns True for weight-only.\n        self.assertTrue(qm.is_weight_only())\n        # Make sure it returns True for weight-only.\n        self.assertTrue(qm.is_int8_weight_only())\n\n    def test_failure_quant(self):\n        # Expect failure if weights are not quantized, but activations are.\n        self.assertRaises(\n            ValueError,\n            lambda: QuantMode.from_description(False, True, False, False))\n\n        # Expect failure if per token and per channel quantization, but weights and activations are not quantized.\n        self.assertRaises(\n            ValueError,\n            lambda: QuantMode.from_description(False, False, True, True))\n\n\nif __name__ == '__main__':\n    unittest.main()\n",
  "replaceAll": false,

        "         # Test weight only."
      ],

}

{
  "command": "python3 << 'EOF'\nimport sys\nsys.path.insert(0, '/workspace')\n\n# Test 1: Check that W4A8_MXFP4_INT8 exists in QuantAlgo\ntry:\n    from tensorrt_llm.quantization.mode import QuantAlgo\n    assert hasattr(QuantAlgo, 'W4A8_MXFP4_INT8'), \"W4A8_MXFP4_INT8 not found in QuantAlgo\"\n    print(\"\u2713 W4A8_MXFP4_INT8 found in QuantAlgo\")\nexcept Exception as e:\n    print(f\"\u2717 Error checking QuantAlgo: {e}\")\n    sys.exit(1)\n\n# Test 2: Check that W4A8_MXFP4_INT8 exists in QuantMode\ntry:\n    from tensorrt_llm.quantization.mode import QuantMode\n    assert hasattr(QuantMode, 'W4A8_MXFP4_INT8'), \"W4A8_MXFP4_INT8 not found in QuantMode\"\n    print(\"\u2713 W4A8_MXFP4_INT8 found in QuantMode\")\nexcept Exception as e:\n    print(f\"\u2717 Error checking QuantMode: {e}\")\n    sys.exit(1)\n\n# Test 3: Check that has_w4a8_mxfp4_int8 method exists\ntry:\n    qm = QuantMode.W4A8_MXFP4_INT8\n    assert hasattr(qm, 'has_w4a8_mxfp4_int8'), \"has_w4a8_mxfp4_int8 method not found\"\n    print(\"\u2713 has_w4a8_mxfp4_int8 method exists\")\nexcept Exception as e:\n    print(f\"\u2717 Error checking has_w4a8_mxfp4_int8: {e}\")\n    sys.exit(1)\n\n# Test 4: Test from_description with W4A8_MXFP4_INT8\ntry:\n    qm = QuantMode.from_description(use_w4a8_mxfp4_int8=True)\n    assert qm.has_w4a8_mxfp4_int8(), \"W4A8_MXFP4_INT8 flag not set\"\n    print(\"\u2713 from_description creates W4A8_MXFP4_INT8 mode correctly\")\nexcept Exception as e:\n    print(f\"\u2717 Error with from_description: {e}\")\n    sys.exit(1)\n\n# Test 5: Test from_quant_algo with W4A8_MXFP4_INT8\ntry:\n    qm = QuantMode.from_quant_algo(QuantAlgo.W4A8_MXFP4_INT8)\n    assert qm.has_w4a8_mxfp4_int8(), \"W4A8_MXFP4_INT8 not set via from_quant_algo\"\n    print(\"\u2713 from_quant_algo creates W4A8_MXFP4_INT8 mode correctly\")\nexcept Exception as e:\n    print(f\"\u2717 Error with from_quant_algo: {e}\")\n    sys.exit(1)\n\n# Test 6: Check to_dict includes W4A8_MXFP4_INT8\ntry:\n    qm = QuantMode.from_quant_algo(QuantAlgo.W4A8_MXFP4_INT8)\n    d = qm.to_dict()\n    assert 'enable_w4a8_mxfp4_int8' in d, \"enable_w4a8_mxfp4_int8 not in to_dict\"\n    assert d['enable_w4a8_mxfp4_int8'] == True, \"enable_w4a8_mxfp4_int8 should be True\"\n    print(\"\u2713 to_dict includes enable_w4a8_mxfp4_int8\")\nexcept Exception as e:\n    print(f\"\u2717 Error with to_dict: {e}\")\n    sys.exit(1)\n\n# Test 7: Check has_mxfp4 includes W4A8_MXFP4_INT8\ntry:\n    qm = QuantMode.from_quant_algo(QuantAlgo.W4A8_MXFP4_INT8)\n    assert qm.has_mxfp4(), \"W4A8_MXFP4_INT8 not recognized as MXFP4\"\n    print(\"\u2713 has_mxfp4 recognizes W4A8_MXFP4_INT8\")\nexcept Exception as e:\n    print(f\"\u2717 Error with has_mxfp4: {e}\")\n    sys.exit(1)\n\n# Test 8: Check has_any_quant includes W4A8_MXFP4_INT8\ntry:\n    qm = QuantMode.from_quant_algo(QuantAlgo.W4A8_MXFP4_INT8)\n    assert qm.has_any_quant(), \"W4A8_MXFP4_INT8 not recognized as quantization\"\n    print(\"\u2713 has_any_quant recognizes W4A8_MXFP4_INT8\")\nexcept Exception as e:\n    print(f\"\u2717 Error with has_any_quant: {e}\")\n    sys.exit(1)\n\nprint(\"\\n\u2713 All tests passed!\")\nEOF\n"

1. EDIT /workspace/tensorrt_llm/quantization/mode.py
Before
class QuantAlgo(StrEnum, metaclass=BaseEnumMeta):
    W8A16 = auto()
    W4A16 = auto()
    W4A16_AWQ = auto()
    W4A8_AWQ = auto()
    W8A16_GPTQ = auto()
    W4A16_GPTQ = auto()
    W8A8_SQ_PER_CHANNEL = auto()
    W8A8_SQ_PER_TENSOR_PLUGIN = auto()
    W8A8_SQ_PER_CHANNEL_PER_TOKEN_PLUGIN = auto()
    W8A8_SQ_PER_CHANNEL_PER_TENSOR_PLUGIN = auto()
    W8A8_SQ_PER_TENSOR_PER_TOKEN_PLUGIN = auto()
    W4A8_QSERVE_PER_GROUP = auto()
    W4A8_QSERVE_PER_CHANNEL = auto()
    FP8 = auto()
    FP8_PER_CHANNEL_PER_TOKEN = auto()
    FP8_BLOCK_SCALES = auto()
    INT8 = auto()
    MIXED_PRECISION = auto()
    NVFP4 = auto()
    W4A8_NVFP4_FP8 = auto()
    W4A8_MXFP4_FP8 = auto()
    W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8 = auto()
    W4A16_MXFP4 = auto()
    NVFP4_AWQ = auto()
    NO_QUANT = auto()
After
class QuantAlgo(StrEnum, metaclass=BaseEnumMeta):
    W8A16 = auto()
    W4A16 = auto()
    W4A16_AWQ = auto()
    W4A8_AWQ = auto()
    W8A16_GPTQ = auto()
    W4A16_GPTQ = auto()
    W8A8_SQ_PER_CHANNEL = auto()
    W8A8_SQ_PER_TENSOR_PLUGIN = auto()
    W8A8_SQ_PER_CHANNEL_PER_TOKEN_PLUGIN = auto()
    W8A8_SQ_PER_CHANNEL_PER_TENSOR_PLUGIN = auto()
    W8A8_SQ_PER_TENSOR_PER_TOKEN_PLUGIN = auto()
    W4A8_QSERVE_PER_GROUP = auto()
    W4A8_QSERVE_PER_CHANNEL = auto()
    FP8 = auto()
    FP8_PER_CHANNEL_PER_TOKEN = auto()
    FP8_BLOCK_SCALES = auto()
    INT8 = auto()
    MIXED_PRECISION = auto()
    NVFP4 = auto()
    W4A8_NVFP4_FP8 = auto()
    W4A8_MXFP4_FP8 = auto()
    W4A8_MXFP4_INT8 = auto()
    W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8 = auto()
    W4A16_MXFP4 = auto()
    NVFP4_AWQ = auto()
    NO_QUANT = auto()
2. EDIT /workspace/tensorrt_llm/quantization/mode.py
Before
    # W4A8 MXFP4
    W4A8_MXFP4_FP8 = auto()
    W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8 = auto()
    W4A16_MXFP4 = auto()

    # The smallest power-of-two that is not used by a flag. Do not call auto() after that line.
    COUNT = auto()
After
    # W4A8 MXFP4
    W4A8_MXFP4_FP8 = auto()
    W4A8_MXFP4_INT8 = auto()
    W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8 = auto()
    W4A16_MXFP4 = auto()

    # The smallest power-of-two that is not used by a flag. Do not call auto() after that line.
    COUNT = auto()

    def has_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8(self):

After
    def has_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8(self):
        return self._any(self.W4A8_MXFP4_FP8)

    def has_w4a8_mxfp4_int8(self):

4. EDIT /workspace/tensorrt_llm/quantization/mode.py
Before
    def has_mxfp4(self):
        return self._any(self.W4A8_MXFP4_FP8 | self.W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8
                         | self.W4A16_MXFP4)
After
    def has_mxfp4(self):
        return self._any(self.W4A8_MXFP4_FP8 | self.W4A8_MXFP4_INT8
                         | self.W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8 | self.W4A16_MXFP4)
5. EDIT /workspace/tensorrt_llm/quantization/mode.py
Before
    def has_any_quant(self, exclude_kv_cache: bool = False):
        has_quant = self._any(self.INT4_WEIGHTS
                              | self.INT8_WEIGHTS
                              | self.ACTIVATIONS
                              | self.FP8_QDQ | self.FP8_ROWWISE
                              | self.W4A8_QSERVE
                              | self.FP8_1x128_128x128
                              | self.NVFP4
                              | self.W4A8_NVFP4_FP8
                              | self.W4A8_MXFP4_FP8
                              | self.W4A16_MXFP4
                              | self.W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8)
        if exclude_kv_cache:
            return has_quant

        return has_quant | self._any(self.INT8_KV_CACHE | self.FP8_KV_CACHE
                                     | self.NVFP4_KV_CACHE)
After
    def has_any_quant(self, exclude_kv_cache: bool = False):
        has_quant = self._any(self.INT4_WEIGHTS
                              | self.INT8_WEIGHTS
                              | self.ACTIVATIONS
                              | self.FP8_QDQ | self.FP8_ROWWISE
                              | self.W4A8_QSERVE
                              | self.FP8_1x128_128x128
                              | self.NVFP4
                              | self.W4A8_NVFP4_FP8
                              | self.W4A8_MXFP4_FP8
                              | self.W4A8_MXFP4_INT8
                              | self.W4A16_MXFP4
                              | self.W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8)
        if exclude_kv_cache:
            return has_quant

        return has_quant | self._any(self.INT8_KV_CACHE | self.FP8_KV_CACHE
                                     | self.NVFP4_KV_CACHE)

8. EDIT /workspace/tensorrt_llm/quantization/mode.py
Before
        if use_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8:
            mode = mode | QuantMode.W4A8_MXFP4_FP8

        if use_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8:
            mode = mode | QuantMode.W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8

        if use_w4a16_mxfp4:
            mode = mode | QuantMode.W4A16_MXFP4

        return mode
After
        if use_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8:
            mode = mode | QuantMode.W4A8_MXFP4_FP8

        if use_w4a8_mxfp4_int8:
            mode = mode | QuantMode.W4A8_MXFP4_INT8

        if use_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8:
            mode = mode | QuantMode.W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8

        if use_w4a16_mxfp4:
            mode = mode | QuantMode.W4A16_MXFP4

        return mode

        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W4A8_MXFP4_FP8:
            quant_mode = QuantMode.from_description(use_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8=True)

After
        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W4A8_MXFP4_FP8:
            quant_mode = QuantMode.from_description(use_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8=True)
        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W4A8_MXFP4_INT8:
            quant_mode = QuantMode.from_description(use_w4a8_mxfp4_int8=True)
        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8:
            quant_mode = QuantMode.from_description(use_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8=True)
        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W4A16_MXFP4:
            quant_mode = QuantMode.from_description(use_w4a16_mxfp4=True)

    def to_dict(self):
        return {
            'use_smooth_quant':
            self.has_act_and_weight_quant(),
            'per_channel':
            self.has_per_channel_scaling(),
            'per_token':
            self.has_per_token_dynamic_scaling(),
            'per_group':
            self.has_per_group_scaling(),
            'int8_kv_cache':
            self.has_int8_kv_cache(),
            'enable_fp8':
            self.has_fp8_qdq(),
            'enable_fp8_rowwise':
            self.has_fp8_rowwise(),
            'enable_fp8_block_scales':
            self.has_fp8_block_scales(),
            'enable_nvfp4':
            self.has_nvfp4(),
            'enable_w4a8_nvfp4_fp8':
            self.has_w4a8_nvfp4_fp8(),
            'enable_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8':
            self.has_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8(),
            'enable_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8':
            self.has_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8(),
            'enable_w4a16_mxfp4':
            self.has_w4a16_mxfp4(),
            'fp8_kv_cache':
            self.has_fp8_kv_cache(),
            'use_weight_only':
            self.is_weight_only(),
            'weight_only_precision':
            'int8' if self.is_int8_weight_only() else 'int4',
        }
After
    def to_dict(self):
        return {
            'use_smooth_quant':
            self.has_act_and_weight_quant(),
            'per_channel':
            self.has_per_channel_scaling(),
            'per_token':
            self.has_per_token_dynamic_scaling(),
            'per_group':
            self.has_per_group_scaling(),
            'int8_kv_cache':
            self.has_int8_kv_cache(),
            'enable_fp8':
            self.has_fp8_qdq(),
            'enable_fp8_rowwise':
            self.has_fp8_rowwise(),
            'enable_fp8_block_scales':
            self.has_fp8_block_scales(),
            'enable_nvfp4':
            self.has_nvfp4(),
            'enable_w4a8_nvfp4_fp8':
            self.has_w4a8_nvfp4_fp8(),
            'enable_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8':
            self.has_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8(),
            'enable_w4a8_mxfp4_int8':
            self.has_w4a8_mxfp4_int8(),
            'enable_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8':
            self.has_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8(),
            'enable_w4a16_mxfp4':
            self.has_w4a16_mxfp4(),
            'fp8_kv_cache':
            self.has_fp8_kv_cache(),
            'use_weight_only':
            self.is_weight_only(),
            'weight_only_precision':
            'int8' if self.is_int8_weight_only() else 'int4',
        }
11. EDIT /workspace/cpp/include/tensorrt_llm/common/quantization.h
Before
    static constexpr QuantMode w4a8Mxfp4Fp8() noexcept
    {
        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 14);
    }

    static constexpr QuantMode w4a8Mxfp4Mxfp8() noexcept
    {
        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 15);
    }

    static constexpr QuantMode w4a16Mxfp4() noexcept
    {
        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 16);
    }
After
    static constexpr QuantMode w4a8Mxfp4Fp8() noexcept
    {
        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 14);
    }

    static constexpr QuantMode w4a8Mxfp4Int8() noexcept
    {
        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 17);
    }

    static constexpr QuantMode w4a8Mxfp4Mxfp8() noexcept
    {
        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 15);
    }

    static constexpr QuantMode w4a16Mxfp4() noexcept
    {
        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 16);
    }
12. EDIT /workspace/cpp/include/tensorrt_llm/common/quantization.h
Before
    constexpr bool hasW4a8Mxfp4Fp8() const noexcept
    {
        return isSet(w4a8Mxfp4Fp8());
    }

    constexpr bool hasW4a8Mxfp4Mxfp8() const noexcept
    {
        return isSet(w4a8Mxfp4Mxfp8());
    }

    constexpr bool hasW4a16Mxfp4() const noexcept
    {
        return isSet(w4a16Mxfp4());
    }
After
    constexpr bool hasW4a8Mxfp4Fp8() const noexcept
    {
        return isSet(w4a8Mxfp4Fp8());
    }

    constexpr bool hasW4a8Mxfp4Int8() const noexcept
    {
        return isSet(w4a8Mxfp4Int8());
    }

    constexpr bool hasW4a8Mxfp4Mxfp8() const noexcept
    {
        return isSet(w4a8Mxfp4Mxfp8());
    }

    constexpr bool hasW4a16Mxfp4() const noexcept
    {
        return isSet(w4a16Mxfp4());
    }

    static constexpr QuantMode fromDescription(bool quantizeWeights, bool quantizeActivations, bool perToken,

After
    static constexpr QuantMode fromDescription(bool quantizeWeights, bool quantizeActivations, bool perToken,
        bool perChannel, bool perGroup, bool useInt4Weights, bool useInt8KvCache, bool useFp8KvCache, bool useFp8Qdq,
        bool useFp8RowWise, bool useW4a8QServe, bool useFp4Quant, bool useFp8BlockScales, bool useW4a8Mxfp4Fp8,

14. EDIT /workspace/cpp/include/tensorrt_llm/common/quantization.h
Before
        if (useW4a8Mxfp4Fp8)
        {
            quantMode += w4a8Mxfp4Fp8();
        }

        if (useW4a8Mxfp4Mxfp8)
        {
            quantMode += w4a8Mxfp4Mxfp8();
        }

        if (useW4a16Mxfp4)
        {
            quantMode += w4a16Mxfp4();
        }

        return quantMode;
    }
After
        if (useW4a8Mxfp4Fp8)
        {
            quantMode += w4a8Mxfp4Fp8();
        }

        if (useW4a8Mxfp4Int8)
        {
            quantMode += w4a8Mxfp4Int8();
        }

        if (useW4a8Mxfp4Mxfp8)
        {
            quantMode += w4a8Mxfp4Mxfp8();
        }

        if (useW4a16Mxfp4)
        {
            quantMode += w4a16Mxfp4();
        }

        return quantMode;
    }

    static constexpr QuantMode useSmoothQuant(bool perToken = false, bool perChannel = false)

            false, false, false, false);
    }

    def override_quant_algo():
        new_algo = os.environ.get("OVERRIDE_QUANT_ALGO", None)
        supported_algos = {
            "W4A16_MXFP4": QuantAlgo.W4A16_MXFP4,
            "W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8": QuantAlgo.W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8,
            "W4A8_MXFP4_FP8": QuantAlgo.W4A8_MXFP4_FP8,
        }
After
    def override_quant_algo():
        new_algo = os.environ.get("OVERRIDE_QUANT_ALGO", None)
        supported_algos = {
            "W4A16_MXFP4": QuantAlgo.W4A16_MXFP4,
            "W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8": QuantAlgo.W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8,
            "W4A8_MXFP4_FP8": QuantAlgo.W4A8_MXFP4_FP8,
            "W4A8_MXFP4_INT8": QuantAlgo.W4A8_MXFP4_INT8,
        }

21. EDIT /workspace/tensorrt_llm/_torch/modules/fused_moe/fused_moe_cutlass.py
Before
        """
        Check if CutlassFusedMoE can implement the given quantization algorithm.

        CutlassFusedMoE supports:
        - Unquantized (FP16/BF16): SM >= 80
        - FP8 per-tensor (QDQ): SM >= 89
        - FP8_BLOCK_SCALES: SM == 90 only
        - NVFP4: SM in {100, 103}
        - W4A8_AWQ: SM in {89, 90} only
        - W8A16: SM >= 80
        - W4A16_MXFP4: SM == 90 only
        - W4A8_MXFP4_FP8: SM in {100, 103}
        - W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8: SM in {100, 103}

        Args:
            quant_algo: The quantization algorithm to check (None for unquantized)
            dtype_activation: The activation input data type (before quantization).
                Supported dtypes vary by quantization mode:
                - Unquantized: float16, bfloat16
                - FP8/FP8_BLOCK_SCALES/W4A8_MXFP4_FP8: float16, bfloat16, float32
                - NVFP4: float16, bfloat16, float8_e4m3fn
                - W4A16_MXFP4/W4A8_AWQ/W8A16/W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8: float16, bfloat16
            gptoss_style: Whether gptoss_style (bias/swiglu with custom alpha/beta/limit) is enabled.
                CutlassFusedMoE only supports gptoss_style for W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8 quantization.

        Returns:
            Tuple[bool, Optional[str]]: (can_implement, skip_reason)
        """
After
        """
        Check if CutlassFusedMoE can implement the given quantization algorithm.

        CutlassFusedMoE supports:
        - Unquantized (FP16/BF16): SM >= 80
        - FP8 per-tensor (QDQ): SM >= 89
        - FP8_BLOCK_SCALES: SM == 90 only
        - NVFP4: SM in {100, 103}
        - W4A8_AWQ: SM in {89, 90} only
        - W8A16: SM >= 80
        - W4A16_MXFP4: SM == 90 only
        - W4A8_MXFP4_FP8: SM in {100, 103}
        - W4A8_MXFP4_INT8: SM in {100, 103}
        - W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8: SM in {100, 103}

        Args:
            quant_algo: The quantization algorithm to check (None for unquantized)
            dtype_activation: The activation input data type (before quantization).
                Supported dtypes vary by quantization mode:
                - Unquantized: float16, bfloat16
                - FP8/FP8_BLOCK_SCALES/W4A8_MXFP4_FP8/W4A8_MXFP4_INT8: float16, bfloat16, float32
                - NVFP4: float16, bfloat16, float8_e4m3fn
                - W4A16_MXFP4/W4A8_AWQ/W8A16/W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8: float16, bfloat16
            gptoss_style: Whether gptoss_style (bias/swiglu with custom alpha/beta/limit) is enabled.
                CutlassFusedMoE only supports gptoss_style for W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8 quantization.

        Returns:
            Tuple[bool, Optional[str]]: (can_implement, skip_reason)
        """
22. EDIT /workspace/tensorrt_llm/_torch/modules/fused_moe/fused_moe_cutlass.py
Before
            elif self.quant_config.layer_quant_mode.has_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8():
                return W4A8MXFP4FP8CutlassFusedMoEMethod()
            elif self.quant_config.layer_quant_mode.has_w4a16_mxfp4():
                return WFP4A16FusedMoEMethod()
            elif self.quant_config.layer_quant_mode.has_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8():
                return W4A8MXFP4MXFP8CutlassFusedMoEMethod()
After
            elif self.quant_config.layer_quant_mode.has_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8():
                return W4A8MXFP4FP8CutlassFusedMoEMethod()
            elif self.quant_config.layer_quant_mode.has_w4a8_mxfp4_int8():
                return W4A8MXFP4INT8CutlassFusedMoEMethod()
            elif self.quant_config.layer_quant_mode.has_w4a16_mxfp4():
                return WFP4A16FusedMoEMethod()
            elif self.quant_config.layer_quant_mode.has_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8():
                return W4A8MXFP4MXFP8CutlassFusedMoEMethod()

    def setup_quant_scales(self, module: torch.nn.Module):
        module.quant_scales = FusedMoEQuantScalesW4A8MXFP4FP8(
            fc31_weight_block_scale=module.w3_w1_weight_scale,

class MXFP4WeightTRTLLMGenFusedMoEMethod(MXFP4WeightFusedMoEMethod):
After
    def setup_quant_scales(self, module: torch.nn.Module):
        module.quant_scales = FusedMoEQuantScalesW4A8MXFP4FP8(
            fc31_weight_block_scale=module.w3_w1_weight_scale,
            fc31_dequant_scale=module.fc31_input_dequant,
            fc2_input_scale=module.fc2_input_scale,
            fc2_weight_block_scale=module.w2_weight_scale,
            fc2_dequant_scale=module.fc2_input_dequant,
        )


class W4A8MXFP4INT8CutlassFusedMoEMethod(MXFP4WeightCutlassFusedMoEMethod):

    def create_weights(self, module: torch.nn.Module):
        fc31_input_scale = nn.Parameter(torch.tensor(1., dtype=torch.float32),
                                        requires_grad=False)
        module.register_parameter("fc31_input_scale", fc31_input_scale)

        fc31_input_dequant = nn.Parameter(torch.empty(
            module.expert_size_per_partition, dtype=torch.float32),
                                          requires_grad=False)
        module.register_parameter("fc31_input_dequant", fc31_input_dequant)

        fc2_input_scale = nn.Parameter(torch.tensor(1., dtype=torch.float32),
                                       requires_grad=False)
        module.register_parameter("fc2_input_scale", fc2_input_scale)

        fc2_input_dequant = nn.Parameter(torch.empty(
            module.expert_size_per_partition, dtype=torch.float32),
                                         requires_grad=False)
        module.register_parameter("fc2_input_dequant", fc2_input_dequant)

        super().create_weights(module)

        self._online_eplb_not_supported(module)

        self.setup_quant_scales(module)

    def load_expert_fc31_input_scale_w4a8_mxfp4_int8(
            self, w1_input_scale, w3_input_scale,
            dst_fc31_input_scale: torch.Tensor):
        w1_input_sc
... (truncated)

32. EDIT /workspace/cpp/include/tensorrt_llm/common/quantization.h
Before
        if (useFp4Quant)
        {
            quantMode += nvfp4();
        }

        if (useW4a8Mxfp4Fp8)
        {
            quantMode += w4a8Mxfp4Fp8();
        }

        if (useW4a8Mxfp4Int8)
        {
            quantMode += w4a8Mxfp4Int8();
        }

        if (useW4a8Mxfp4Mxfp8)
        {
            quantMode += w4a8Mxfp4Mxfp8();
        }

        if (useW4a16Mxfp4)
        {
            quantMode += w4a16Mxfp4();
        }

        return quantMode;
After
        if (useFp4Quant)
        {
            quantMode += nvfp4();
        }

        if (useW4a8Nvfp4Fp8)
        {
            quantMode += w4a8Nvfp4Fp8();
        }

        if (useW4a8Mxfp4Fp8)
        {
            quantMode += w4a8Mxfp4Fp8();
        }

        if (useW4a8Mxfp4Int8)
        {
            quantMode += w4a8Mxfp4Int8();
        }

        if (useW4a8Mxfp4Mxfp8)
        {
            quantMode += w4a8Mxfp4Mxfp8();
        }

        if (useW4a16Mxfp4)
        {
            quantMode += w4a16Mxfp4();
        }

        return quantMode;

        Bash Commands (45)

14. $ find /workspace -name "quantization.py" -path "*fused_moe*"
15. $ grep -n "class W4A8MXFP4FP8CutlassFusedMoEMethod\|class W4A8MXFP4MXFP8CutlassFusedMoEMethod" /workspace/tensorrt_llm/_torch/modules/fused_moe/quantization.py
16. $ grep -n "class MXFP4WeightCutlassFusedMoEMethod\|class MXFP4WeightFusedMoEMethod" /workspace/tensorrt_llm/_torch/modules/fused_moe/quantization.py
17. $ grep -n "class FusedMoEQuantScalesW4A8MXFP4FP8" /workspace/tensorrt_llm/_torch/modules/fused_moe/quantization.py
18. $ grep -r "W4A8_MXFP4_FP8" /workspace --include="*.py" | grep -v "test_" | grep -v ".pyc" | head -30
19. $ grep -n "W4A8_MXFP4_FP8" /workspace/tensorrt_llm/_torch/modules/fused_moe/fused_moe_triton.py
20. $ grep -n "W4A8_MXFP4_FP8" /workspace/tensorrt_llm/_torch/modules/fused_moe/fused_moe_trtllm_gen.py
21. $ grep -r "W4A8_MXFP4_FP8" /workspace/cpp --include="*.h" --include="*.cu" --include="*.cpp" 2>/dev/null | head -20
22. $ grep -n -B 10 -A 10 "W4A8_MXFP4_FP8" /workspace/cpp/tensorrt_llm/thop/moeOp.cpp | head -40
23. $ grep -n "isWMxfp4AFp8Quant\|isWMxfp4AMxfp8Quant" /workspace/cpp/tensorrt_llm/thop/moeOp.cpp | head -20
24. $ grep -r "W4A8_MXFP4_FP8\|W4A8_MXFP4_INT8" /workspace/tests --include="*.py" | head -20
25. $ python -c "from tensorrt_llm.quantization.mode import QuantAlgo, QuantMode; print('QuantAlgo.W4A8_MXFP4_INT8:', QuantAlgo.W4A8_MXFP4_INT8); print('QuantMode.W4A8_MXFP4_INT8 defined:', hasattr(QuantMode, 'W4A8_MXFP4_INT8'))" 2>&1 | head -20
26. $ python -m py_compile /workspace/tensorrt_llm/quantization/mode.py && echo "Syntax check passed"
27. $ grep -A 20 "w4a8Mxfp4Int8\|hasW4a8Mxfp4Int8" /workspace/cpp/include/tensorrt_llm/common/quantization.h
28. $ find /workspace -name "*.cpp" -o -name "*.h" | xargs grep -l "pybind11.*QuantMode\|pybind11.*quantAlgo" 2>/dev/null | head -5
29. $ grep -r "W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8\|from_quant_algo" /workspace/tensorrt_llm --include="*.py" | grep -v "test_" | head -20
30. $ grep -n "W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8" /workspace/tensorrt_llm/_torch/custom_ops/torch_custom_ops.py
31. $ grep -r "has_mxfp4\|has_any_quant" /workspace/tensorrt_llm --include="*.py" | grep "def " | head -10
32. $ grep -n "w4a8Mxfp4\|w4a16Mxfp4" /workspace/cpp/include/tensorrt_llm/common/quantization.h | head -20
33. $ grep -n "w4a8Nvfp4\|W4A8_NVFP4" /workspace/cpp/include/tensorrt_llm/common/quantization.h
34. $ grep -n "W4A8_NVFP4_FP8" /workspace/tensorrt_llm/quantization/mode.py
35. $ grep -B 2 -A 2 "1u.*<<.*14" /workspace/cpp/include/tensorrt_llm/common/quantization.h
36. $ grep -n "w4a8.*Nvfp4\|w4a8.*nvfp4" /workspace/cpp/include/tensorrt_llm/common/quantization.h
37. $ grep -r "W4A8_NVFP4" /workspace/cpp --include="*.h" --include="*.cpp" 2>/dev/null | head -20
38. $ python -m py_compile /workspace/tensorrt_llm/quantization/mode.py /workspace/tensorrt_llm/_torch/model_config.py && echo "Python syntax check passed"
39. $ grep -r "W4A8_MXFP4_FP8\|W4A8_NVFP4_FP8" /workspace/tensorrt_llm --include="*.py" | grep -v test_ | grep -v ".pyc" | wc -l
40. $ grep -r "W4A8_MXFP4_FP8" /workspace/tensorrt_llm --include="*.py" | grep -v test_ | grep -v ".pyc" | grep -v "quantization/mode.py" | grep -v "model_config.py" | grep -v "fused_moe" | head -20
41. $ python3 << 'EOF'
import sys
sys.path.insert(0, '/workspace')

# Test 1: Check that W4A8_MXFP4_INT8 exists in QuantAlgo
try:
    from tensorrt_llm.quantization.mode import QuantAlgo
    assert hasattr(QuantAlgo, 'W4A8_MXFP4_INT8'), "W4A8_MXFP4_INT8 not found in QuantAlgo"
    print("✓ W4A8_MXFP4_INT8 found in QuantAlgo")
except Exception as e:
    print(f"✗ Error checking QuantAlgo: {e}")
    sys.exit(1)

# Test 2: Check that W4A8_MXFP4_INT8 exists in QuantMode
try:
    from tensorrt_llm.quantization.mode import QuantMode
    assert hasattr(QuantMode, 'W4A8_MXFP4_INT8'), "W4A8_MXFP4_INT8 not found in QuantMode"
    print("✓ W4A8_MXFP4_INT8 found in QuantMode")
except Exception as e:
    print(f"✗ Error checking QuantMode: {e}")
    sys.exit(1)

# Test 3: Check that has_w4a8_mxfp4_int8 method exists
try:
    qm = QuantMode.W4A8_MXFP4_INT8
    assert hasattr(qm, 'has_w4a8_mxfp4_int8'), "has_w4a8_mxfp4_int8 method not found"
    print("✓ has_w4a8_mxfp4_int8 method exists")
except Exception as e:
    print(f"✗ Error checking has_w4a8_mxfp4_int8: {e}")
    sys.exit(1)

# Test 4: Test from_description with W4A8_MXFP4_INT8
try:
    qm = QuantMode.from_description(use_w4a8_mxfp4_int8=True)
    assert qm.has_w4a8_mxfp4_int8(), "W4A8_MXFP4_INT8 flag not set"
    print("✓ from_description creates W4A8_MXFP4_INT8 mode correctly")
except Exception as e:
    print(f"✗ Error with from_description: {e}")
    sys.exit(1)

# Test 5: Test from_quant_algo with W4A8_MXFP4_INT8
try:
    qm = QuantMode.from_quant_algo(QuantAlgo.W4A8_MXFP4_INT8)
    assert qm.has_w4a8_mxfp4_int8(), "W4A8_MXFP4_INT8 not set via from_quant_algo"
    print("✓ from_quant_algo creates W4A8_MXFP4_INT8 mode correctly")
except Exception as e:
    print(f"✗ Error with from_quant_algo: {e}")
    sys.exit(1)

# Test 6: Check to_dict includes W4A8_MXFP4_INT8
try:
    qm = QuantMode.from_quant_algo(QuantAlgo.W4A8_MXFP4_INT8)
    d = qm.to_dict()
    assert 'enable_w4a8_mxfp4_int8' in d, "enable_w4a8_mxfp4_int8 not in to_dict"
    assert d['enable_w4a8_mxfp4_int8'] == True, "enable_w4a8_mxfp4_int8 should be True"
    print("✓ to_dict includes enable_w4a8_mxfp4_int8")
except Exception as e:
    print(f"✗ Error with to_dict: {e}")
    sys.exit(1)

# Test 7: Check has_mxfp4 includes W4A8_MXFP4_INT8
try:
    qm = QuantMode.from_quant_algo(QuantAlgo.W4A8_MXFP4_INT8)
    assert qm.has_mxfp4(), "W4A8_MXFP4_INT8 not recognized as MXFP4"
    print("✓ has_mxfp4 recognizes W4A8_MXFP4_INT8")
except Exception as e:
    print(f"✗ Error with has_mxfp4: {e}")
    sys.exit(1)

# Test 8: Check has_any_quant includes W4A8_MXFP4_INT8
try:
    qm = QuantMode.from_quant_algo(QuantAlgo.W4A8_MXFP4_INT8)
    assert qm.has_any_quant(), "W4A8_MXFP4_INT8 not recognized as quantization"
    print("✓ has_any_quant recognizes W4A8_MXFP4_INT8")
except Exception as e:
    print(f"✗ Error with has_any_quant: {e}")
    sys.exit(1)

print("\n✓ All tests passed!")
EOF

42. $ grep -c "W4A8_MXFP4_INT8" /workspace/tensorrt_llm/quantization/mode.py /workspace/cpp/include/tensorrt_llm/common/quantization.h /workspace/tensorrt_llm/_torch/model_config.py /workspace/tensorrt_llm/_torch/modules/fused_moe/fused_moe_cutlass.py /workspace/tensorrt_llm/_torch/modules/fused_moe/quantization.py
43. $ grep -n "class W4A8MXFP4INT8CutlassFusedMoEMethod\|FusedMoEQuantScalesW4A8MXFP4INT8" /workspace/tensorrt_llm/_torch/modules/fused_moe/quantization.py
44. $ grep "W4A8MXFP4INT8CutlassFusedMoEMethod" /workspace/tensorrt_llm/_torch/modules/fused_moe/fused_moe_cutlass.py
45. $ cat > /tmp/verify_changes.sh << 'EOF'
#!/bin/bash
echo "Verifying W4A8_MXFP4_INT8 Implementation"
echo "========================================"

# Check Python changes
echo ""
echo "1. Python QuantAlgo enum:"
grep -c "W4A8_MXFP4_INT8 = auto()" /workspace/tensorrt_llm/quantization/mode.py > /dev/null && echo "   ✓ W4A8_MXFP4_INT8 in QuantAlgo" || echo "   ✗ Missing in QuantAlgo"

# Check Python QuantMode
echo "2. Python QuantMode flags:"
grep -c "W4A8_MXFP4_INT8 = auto()" /workspace/tensorrt_llm/quantization/mode.py | grep -q "2" && echo "   ✓ W4A8_MXFP4_INT8 in QuantMode" || echo "   ✗ Missing in QuantMode"

# Check has_w4a8_mxfp4_int8
echo "3. Python helper methods:"
grep -c "def has_w4a8_mxfp4_int8" /workspace/tensorrt_llm/quantization/mode.py > /dev/null && echo "   ✓ has_w4a8_mxfp4_int8() method" || echo "   ✗ Missing has_w4a8_mxfp4_int8() method"

# Check from_quant_algo
echo "4. Python from_quant_algo:"
grep -c "elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W4A8_MXFP4_INT8:" /workspace/tensorrt_llm/quantization/mode.py > /dev/null && echo "   ✓ from_quant_algo handles W4A8_MXFP4_INT8" || echo "   ✗ from_quant_algo missing"

# Check C++ methods
echo "5. C++ QuantMode methods:"
grep -c "w4a8Mxfp4Int8()" /workspace/cpp/include/tensorrt_llm/common/quantization.h > /dev/null && echo "   ✓ w4a8Mxfp4Int8() method" || echo "   ✗ Missing w4a8Mxfp4Int8() method"

# Check C++ fromQuantAlgo
echo "6. C++ fromQuantAlgo:"
grep -c 'quantAlgo == "W4A8_MXFP4_INT8"' /workspace/cpp/include/tensorrt_llm/common/quantization.h > /dev/null && echo "   ✓ fromQuantAlgo handles W4A8_MXFP4_INT8" || echo "   ✗ fromQuantAlgo missing"

# Check quantization scales
echo "7. MOE Quantization Scales:"
grep -c "class FusedMoEQuantScalesW4A8MXFP4INT8" /workspace/tensorrt_llm/_torch/modules/fused_moe/quantization.py > /dev/null && echo "   ✓ FusedMoEQuantScalesW4A8MXFP4INT8 defined" || echo "   ✗ Missing quantization scales"

# Check MOE method
echo "8. MOE Method Class:"
grep -c "class W4A8MXFP4INT8CutlassFusedMoEMethod" /workspace/tensorrt_llm/_torch/modules/fused_moe/quantization.py > /dev/null && echo "   ✓ W4A8MXFP4INT8CutlassFusedMoEMethod defined" || echo "   ✗ Missing MOE method class"

# Check CutlassFusedMoE support
echo "9. CutlassFusedMoE Support:"
grep -c "W4A8_MXFP4_INT8:" /workspace/tensorrt_llm/_torch/modules/fused_moe/fused_moe_cutlass.py > /dev/null && echo "   ✓ CutlassFusedMoE quant table updated" || echo "   ✗ CutlassFusedMoE table missing"

# Check TRTLLMGenFusedMoE support
echo "10. TRTLLMGenFusedMoE Support:"
grep -c "QuantAlgo.W4A8_MXFP4_INT8" /workspace/tensorrt_llm/_torch/modules/fused_moe/fused_moe_trtllm_gen.py > /dev/null && echo "   ✓ TRTLLMGenFusedMoE support added" || echo "   ✗ TRTLLMGenFusedMoE missing"

echo ""
echo "All key components verified!"
EOF
bash /tmp/verify_changes.sh
